name: Wuthering Waves - General Lorebook
description: Merged Wuthering Waves lorebook shared by the card set.

entries.content: [ Solaris-3: Solaris-3, also called Sol-III, is the inhabited world after the Lament. It contains altered terrain, unstable frequencies, old ruins, surviving nations, independent city-states, Resonators, Tacet Discords, and human societies built around post-Lament survival. Its major cultures include Huanglong, Rinascita, Lahai-Roi, the New Federation, and Ashinohara. ]
entries.name: Concept: Solaris-3

entries.content: [ The Lament: The Lament is a family of catastrophic phenomena that reshaped Solaris-3. A Lament can strike globally or regionally, alter physical law, damage land and memory, produce Remnant Energy, create Waveworn Phenomena, and leave conditions where Tacet Discords and Resonator crises become common. ]
entries.name: Concept: The Lament

entries.content: [ Waveworn Phenomenon: A Waveworn Phenomenon is an abnormal state left by the Lament. Examples include fractured terrain, unstable frequencies, displaced ruins, altered matter, distorted time, strange memory effects, and locations where familiar physical behavior no longer holds. ]
entries.name: Concept: Waveworn Phenomenon

entries.content: [ Remnant Energy: Remnant Energy is lingering frequency residue left by life, emotion, memory, and catastrophe. It remains in unstable locations, disaster sites, Sonoro Spheres, Echo traces, Tacet Discord remains, and other places where frequency and memory endure after ordinary forms vanish. ]
entries.name: Concept: Remnant Energy

entries.content: [ Resonators: Resonators are people who awaken the ability to resonate with objects, elements, or concepts and manipulate frequencies through a Forte. Awakening usually follows powerful experiences, inner traits, or severe pressure. Resonators carry Tacet Marks and undergo examination because their powers can affect their bodies, minds, and surroundings. ]
entries.name: Concept: Resonators

entries.content: [ Forte: A Forte is the unique frequency ability expressed by a Resonator. It may appear as elemental power, bodily transformation, mental influence, perception, memory, poison, music, mechanics, or another unusual phenomenon. A Forte reflects the Resonator's nature, history, and frequency pattern. ]
entries.name: Concept: Forte

entries.content: [ Tacet Mark: A Tacet Mark is the visible sign of Resonator Awakening. Its location differs by individual and often appears in examination records alongside Forte behavior, waveform changes, and stability notes. Tacet Marks help identify the physical link between a Resonator and the frequency power they carry. ]
entries.name: Concept: Tacet Mark

entries.content: [ Rabelle's Curve: Rabelle's Curve is a classification framework used in Resonator examinations. Common labels include Natural, Mutant, and Congenital. Individual cases can also receive unusual notes such as Artificial, Non-congenital, Unclear, or Unknown when the Resonator's condition does not fit common categories. ]
entries.name: Concept: Rabelle's Curve

entries.content: [ Resonance Spectrum Pattern: A Resonance Spectrum Pattern describes the frequency signature of a Resonator, Tacet Discord, or related phenomenon. Similar patterns can suggest dangerous overlap between human Resonators and Tacet Discord influence, so examiners treat Spectrum Pattern similarities with great caution. ]
entries.name: Concept: Resonance Spectrum Pattern

entries.content: [ Overclocking: Overclocking is a dangerous state in which a Resonator loses stable control of their Forte or frequency output. It can be triggered by stress, trauma, exhaustion, emotional strain, or extreme resonance pressure. Overclocking can harm the Resonator, endanger others, and leave lasting physical or mental consequences. ]
entries.name: Concept: Overclocking

entries.content: [ Tacet Discords: Tacet Discords are beings formed from chaotic frequencies after the Lament. They possess Tacet Cores and Reverberation Bodies, consume frequencies, imitate living beings or objects, and leave traces that can become Echoes. ]
entries.name: Concept: Tacet Discords

entries.content: [ Tacet Core: A Tacet Core is the central structure of a Tacet Discord. It anchors the being's frequency and allows its body to persist. When a Tacet Discord is defeated, the decay of its frequency can leave behind an Echo or other traces useful to Resonators and researchers. ]
entries.name: Concept: Tacet Core

entries.content: [ Reverberation Body: A Reverberation Body is the manifested form of a Tacet Discord. These bodies can resemble animals, people, plants, objects, or stranger shapes depending on the frequencies they mimic. The term reflects that a Tacet Discord is sustained by resonant frequency rather than ordinary biology. ]
entries.name: Concept: Reverberation Body

entries.content: [ Echoes: Echoes are lingering frequency forms left after Tacet Discords or related phenomena decay. A Resonator can use an Echo to imitate an ability or draw on a stored frequency pattern. Echoes belong to the ecology of Remnant Energy across Solaris-3. ]
entries.name: Concept: Echoes

entries.content: [ Whisperin: Whisperin-type Tacet Discords imitate human forms, voices, or behavior. Their mimicry covers person-like shapes and social conduct rather than animals, plants, or objects. ]
entries.name: Concept: Whisperin

entries.content: [ Murmurin: Murmurin-type Tacet Discords belong to the humanlike side of Tacet Discord classification. Their forms and behavior echo human traces through chaotic frequency imitation. ]
entries.name: Concept: Murmurin

entries.content: [ Howler: Howler-type Tacet Discords mimic flora or fauna. They resemble beasts, plants, or natural creatures while remaining frequency-born entities. ]
entries.name: Concept: Howler

entries.content: [ Tranquilite: Tranquilite-type Tacet Discords mimic earth, stone, minerals, and other inorganic natural matter. Their bodies are frequency-born imitations of nonliving natural forms. ]
entries.name: Concept: Tranquilite

entries.content: [ Staticoid: Staticoid-type Tacet Discords mimic or parasitize man-made objects. Their forms resemble tools, structures, devices, or other artificial objects touched by chaotic frequency. ]
entries.name: Concept: Staticoid

entries.content: [ Clamorling: Clamorling-type Tacet Discords are a poorly understood Tacet Discord class. Their classification remains incomplete compared with clearer mimicry types such as Whisperin, Howler, Tranquilite, and Staticoid. ]
entries.name: Concept: Clamorling

entries.content: [ Sentinels: Sentinels are powerful guardian beings of Solaris-3. Huanglong reveres Sentinels such as Jué, Hsin, and Fang. Rinascita has Imperator. A Sentinel may grant guidance, protection, authority, or burdens to a chosen Resonator. ]
entries.name: Concept: Sentinels

entries.content: [ Sentinel Jué: Jué is the loong-like Sentinel of Jinzhou. Jinhsi is Jué's appointed Resonator from birth, and Jinzhou's spiritual and political duty rests heavily on that bond. ]
entries.name: Concept: Sentinel Jué

entries.content: [ Imperator: Imperator is Rinascita's Sentinel and the divine authority behind the Blessed Maiden tradition. The history of Imperator includes divine vessels, titles, the Order of the Deep, Cartethyia, and Cantarella. ]
entries.name: Concept: Imperator

entries.content: [ Threnodians: Threnodians are terrifying beings born from Laments. They can destroy human spirit, feed on collapsed will, and stand as embodiments of disaster rather than ordinary enemies. Fractsidus seeks the return of Threnodians as part of its pursuit of a future Lament. ]
entries.name: Concept: Threnodians

entries.content: [ True Lament: The True Lament is the future disaster sought by Fractsidus. To its followers, the next great Lament is not merely destruction, but a transformation they wish to hasten through Threnodians and radical frequency ideology. Other factions resist it as an existential threat to humanity. ]
entries.name: Concept: True Lament

entries.content: [ Black Shores: The Black Shores is a covert organization devoted to Lament threat monitoring, frequency study, disaster response, and humanity protection. Its structure includes the Tethys System, Resonance Beacons, members, consultants, and the Shorekeeper. ]
entries.name: Concept: Black Shores

entries.content: [ Tethys System: The Tethys System is the Black Shores' predictive and analytical system for Lament threats. It watches frequency patterns, calculates danger, and forms the duty at the center of the Shorekeeper's existence. ]
entries.name: Concept: Tethys System

entries.content: [ Resonance Beacons: Resonance Beacons are devices for travel, communication, stabilization, and monitoring after the Lament. They are infrastructure for crossing fractured land and responding to disasters on Solaris-3. ]
entries.name: Concept: Resonance Beacons

entries.content: [ Fractsidus: Fractsidus is an extremist organization that seeks the next Lament and the return of Threnodians. Phrolova, Scar, and infiltrating operatives belong among its members or former members. The group treats destruction and rebirth as ideology. ]
entries.name: Concept: Fractsidus

entries.content: [ Huanglong: Huanglong is a major nation of Solaris-3. Its capital is Mingting, its important cities include Jinzhou, and its culture venerates Sentinels. Huanglong contains academies, security forces, military structures, ministries, and civic institutions. ]
entries.name: Concept: Huanglong

entries.content: [ Mingting: Mingting is the capital of Huanglong and the seat of important ministries and political institutions. Qiuyuan's history with Chongzhou and the Internal Security Agency touches Mingting's administrative world, where Sentinel affairs, justice, and security intersect. ]
entries.name: Concept: Mingting

entries.content: [ Jinzhou: Jinzhou is a major city of Huanglong under the protection and authority of its Magistrate. Sentinel Jué, City Hall, patrol forces, scientific institutions, border defense, and ordinary civic life are all part of Jinzhou. ]
entries.name: Concept: Jinzhou

entries.content: [ Rinascita: Rinascita is a nation of independent city-states rather than a single centralized realm. Its major locations include Ragunna, Septimont, and Lilyland. Rinascita contains Imperator worship, noble families, performers, gladiatorial culture, civic councils, old faiths, and hidden disasters. ]
entries.name: Concept: Rinascita

entries.content: [ Ragunna: Ragunna is a Rinascita city-state. Its society includes the Order of the Deep, the Fisalia family, the Montelli family, Porto-Veno Castle, Averardo Bank, city politics, family traditions, faith, commerce, and performance culture. ]
entries.name: Concept: Ragunna

entries.content: [ Septimont: Septimont is a Rinascita city-state known for gladiatorial culture, the Tetragon Temple, prophetic authority, arenas, civic pride, communal honor, fate, competition, and public courage. ]
entries.name: Concept: Septimont

entries.content: [ Lahai-Roi: Lahai-Roi is a region of Solaris-3 with Startorch Academy, the Spacetrek Collective, the Roya Tribe, Exostrider, the Roya Frostlands, and conflicts around the Threnodian Aleph-1. ]
entries.name: Concept: Lahai-Roi

entries.content: [ Roya Frostlands: The Roya Frostlands are the frozen northern lands around Lahai-Roi and the Roya Tribe. Their history includes Startorch Academy, Exostrider, Aleph-1, old disasters, survival, research ambition, and post-Lament cold. ]
entries.name: Concept: Roya Frostlands

entries.content: [ Startorch Academy: Startorch Academy is a major Lahai-Roi institution for Resonator care, research, student life, medical units, teaching, Exostrider Engineering, and post-Lament survival work. ]
entries.name: Concept: Startorch Academy

entries.content: [ Spacetrek Collective: The Spacetrek Collective is a research organization centered on discovery, space-time ambition, Startorch Academy, and Lahai-Roi's attempt to understand the fractured world beyond ordinary boundaries. ]
entries.name: Concept: Spacetrek Collective

entries.content: [ New Federation: The New Federation is a region of Solaris-3 marked by urban power, privilege, social divisions, institutions, exiles, mercenaries, and the nearby Lawless Zone. ]
entries.name: Concept: New Federation

entries.content: [ Lawless Zone: The Lawless Zone is a place of exile, mercenary life, Fractsidus activity, stolen identities, and survival outside ordinary law. Its culture rewards endurance, secrecy, violence, and adaptation. ]
entries.name: Concept: Lawless Zone

entries.content: [ Ashinohara: Ashinohara is Hiyuki's birthplace and a vanished land connected to miko traditions, wishes entrusted across time, and the mystery surrounding its disappearance. Hiyuki's service, Suzu, and long life carry Ashinohara's memory into Lahai-Roi's present conflicts. ]
entries.name: Concept: Ashinohara

entries.content: [ Huaxu Academy: Huaxu Academy is Huanglong's major research institution. Its fields include Resonator research, Automata Mechanics, Tacetite study, Tacetite Weaponry, safety engineering, and scientific investigation. ]
entries.name: Concept: Huaxu Academy

entries.content: [ Public Security Bureau: The Public Security Bureau is Jinzhou's public safety force. Chixia serves as a junior Patroller there, making its work part of everyday protection, street-level order, and the defense of ordinary citizens in a city shaped by Lament threats. ]
entries.name: Concept: Public Security Bureau

entries.content: [ Internal Security Agency: The Internal Security Agency handles security affairs around Mingting and Chongzhou. Qiuyuan once served as a senior agent before being framed for his master's death, turning the agency from former duty into a burden from his past. ]
entries.name: Concept: Internal Security Agency

entries.content: [ Order of the Deep: The Order of the Deep is a Rinascita religious and political organization around Imperator, Ragunna's faith, the Blessed Maiden tradition, divine vessels, and the titles carried by Cartethyia. ]
entries.name: Concept: Order of the Deep

entries.content: [ Fisalia Family: The Fisalia family is a powerful Ragunna family known for poison, the Sea of Dreams, and the burdens carried by Cantarella Fisalia. Its traditions, servants, gardens, and Porto-Veno Castle frame Cantarella's elegance, captivity, and search for release from lineage. ]
entries.name: Concept: Fisalia Family

entries.content: [ Montelli Family: The Montelli family is a major Ragunna family of finance, tradition, status, and social power. Averardo Bank belongs to the family, and Montelli identity carries both privilege and obligation. ]
entries.name: Concept: Montelli Family

entries.content: [ Averardo Bank: Averardo Bank is the Montelli family's bank in Ragunna and part of Zani's ordered daytime life. Her long association with the bank contrasts with the fierce night identity and justice-driven force that define her other side. ]
entries.name: Concept: Averardo Bank

entries.content: [ Troupe of Fools: The Troupe of Fools is a Rinascita performance troupe led by Brant. It functions as a chosen family built around spectacle, freedom, stagecraft, loyalty, and the search for a secure haven. ]
entries.name: Concept: Troupe of Fools

entries.content: [ Ghost Hounds: The Ghost Hounds are Calcharo's mercenary group. Their reputation is ruthless and professional, shaped by Calcharo's past in the Lawless Zone and his insistence on fair price, hard contracts, and consequences for betrayal. ]
entries.name: Concept: Ghost Hounds

entries.content: [ Tetragon Temple: The Tetragon Temple governs Septimont alongside its prophetic traditions. Iuno serves as a priestess there, reading futures through moonlight while resisting the cruelty of fate and the expectations placed on her position. ]
entries.name: Concept: Tetragon Temple

entries.content: [ Miko of Flaming Sakura: The Miko of Flaming Sakura tradition belongs to Ashinohara and Hiyuki's sacred duty. It carries inherited wishes, Suzu, long life, miko service, and the burden of confronting Aleph-1. ]
entries.name: Concept: Miko of Flaming Sakura

entries.content: [ Special Response Force: The Special Response Force is one of Hiyuki's affiliations in Lahai-Roi. Its work concerns abnormal threats, Aleph-1, Startorch, the Frostlands, and Hiyuki's combat duty as a miko. ]
entries.name: Concept: Special Response Force

entries.content: [ Exostrider: Exostrider is a protector-like entity of Lahai-Roi and the focus of Startorch engineering. Aemeath became Exostrider's Resonator after overclocking to resonate with it, losing her body and remaining as a digital ghost visible only to Rover. ]
entries.name: Concept: Exostrider

entries.content: [ Dark Tide: The Dark Tide is a dangerous Rinascita phenomenon of corruption, sea-born disaster, Leviathan influence, twisted faith, altered bodies, broken memories, and coastal catastrophe. ]
entries.name: Concept: Dark Tide

entries.content: [ Leviathan: Leviathan is the Threnodian of Rinascita's Dark Tide history. Cartethyia carries both Sentinel and Threnodian power, and Leviathan is part of her burden as Blessed Maiden. ]
entries.name: Concept: Leviathan

entries.content: [ Chimera: Chimera is the Tacet Discord force central to Galbrena's hunt. Galbrena consumes Tacet Discord frequencies and powers, and Chimera belongs to the fiery rebirth from Angel into Discord Slayer and Fiend of Ever-burning Flame. ]
entries.name: Concept: Chimera

entries.content: [ Aalto identity: Aalto is a Resonator with Aero frequency who uses uses Pistols. Resonator classification: Congenital. Title: Mistcloak Strike. Affiliation: Black Shores. Origin: New Federation. Nation: The Black Shores. Aalto is an enigmatic Information Broker, known for his elusive nature and welcoming smile. Rumor has it he'll provide any information at the right price. He was invited to join the Black Shores, a mysterious organization based on an isolated island, for his intel-gathering expertise. ]
entries.name: Aalto identity

entries.content: [ Aalto appearance: Aalto is a tall, slim man with light gray hair and a stylish black-and-white long coat, dark gloves, and boots. His shoulder-mounted mist devices strengthen and store the mist he creates, while the sunglasses he carries and the bone-flute tape recorder he keeps from childhood give him the look of a casual intelligence broker who is always prepared. ]
entries.name: Aalto appearance

entries.content: [ Aalto Forte: Associated Forte or power: Mistcloak Strike. Evaluation Basis: [Resonance Assessment 1617-G]. According to Resonator Aalto's reports, there was a rare occurrence of heavy fog on the day of his birth. Aalto's Tacet Mark is located on the left side of his neck. Other than gaining the ability to briefly transform into a mist-like form, no significant physical changes have been observed in Aalto's body after his Awakening. Resonator Aalto excels in the art of camouflage and transformation, often assuming an elusive and fluctuating physical state, a ]
entries.name: Aalto Forte

entries.content: [ Aalto resonance stability: Resonator Aalto's waveform graph shows displays stable elliptical fluctuations in the Time Domain with no abnormal patterns. Upon examination, all results fall within normal parameters. In terms of Resonant Criticality, Resonator Aalto ranks at a moderate level with high stability, resulting in a low risk of Overclocking. Resonator Aalto disappeared halfway through the Overclock diagnosis, thus no Overclock history records were obtained. ]
entries.name: Aalto resonance stability

entries.content: [ Aalto personality: Aalto is an enigmatic Information Broker, known for his elusive nature and welcoming smile. Rumor has it he'll provide any information at the right price. He was invited to join the Black Shores, a mysterious organization based on an isolated island, for his intel-gathering expertise. Both working for the Black Shores as Consultants, Aalto and Encore have become an inseparable and lively duo during missions. Despite his skittish demeanor, Aalto's true character shines through as a reliable and attentive individual. ]
entries.name: Aalto personality

entries.content: [ Aalto affiliations: Aalto belongs to Black Shores. Important place context: New Federation, The Black Shores. ]
entries.name: Aalto affiliations

entries.content: [ Aalto history: Aalto is an enigmatic Information Broker, known for his elusive nature and welcoming smile. Rumor has it he'll provide any information at the right price. A Bad Deal: A bad deal. Or so it seemed. One day, Aalto became known for the intel he had on some ancient treasure. From naughty children to old men in their sixties, many wanted to buy that intel from him, but he politely turned down every offer. Hey, little one. Better not spend Rover's allowance on this. Let's get Rover home.". A Fair Exchange: A fair exchange. ]
entries.name: Aalto history

entries.content: [ Aalto and Baizhi: Aalto views Baizhi: Hmm, Seems unlikely she'll ever be my client. She's the type of person to trust the conclusions from her own research over information provided by anyone else. ]
entries.name: Aalto and Baizhi

entries.content: [ Aalto and Calcharo: Aalto views Calcharo: I always enjoy doing business with a Ghost Hound. They keep things clean, They're straightforward, and they don't goof around. Calcharo views Aalto: Need to reach Aalto? Here's his contact. Mention my name for a twenty percent discount. ]
entries.name: Aalto and Calcharo

entries.content: [ Aalto and Camellya: Camellya views Aalto: Aalto's a master at mind games. It's hard to get under his skin! He's not strong enough to pique my interest though. That guy relies on trickery too much for my liking. ]
entries.name: Aalto and Camellya

entries.content: [ Aalto and Chixia: Aalto views Chixia: Oh, Miss Chixia. Our first convo didn't go quite as planned. Lucky for me we worked it out later. ]
entries.name: Aalto and Chixia

entries.content: [ Aalto and Encore: Aalto views Encore: Sometimes not even I can figure out just where Encore's getting all that energy from. As soon as we arrive somewhere, she's off making friends and sharing stories with the local kids in no time. I even got some of my intel from her buddies, believe it or not. ]
entries.name: Aalto and Encore

entries.content: [ Aalto and Jiyan: Aalto views Jiyan: Being the Jinzhou Garrison's General is no walk in the park. Rover gotta have that big-picture thinking, be on top of everything, and make decisions like they're nothing. Just take a look at General Jiyan, he's got all those boxes checked off and then some. ]
entries.name: Aalto and Jiyan

entries.content: [ Aalto and Mortefi: Aalto views Mortefi: The Academy's red-haired international research fellow? I heard he's got a way of handling difficult clients. Actually I was thinking about asking him for some pointers. ]
entries.name: Aalto and Mortefi

entries.content: [ Aalto and Shorekeeper: Shorekeeper views Aalto: A mature organization requires a personable and skilled negotiator, adept at forging connections with all they encounter. In the case of the Black Shores, that person is Aalto. His keen insight ensures he obtains crucial information precisely when needed. Beneath his playful smile lies a resolute determination to end the Lament. Despite other offers, he was destined for the Black Shores' path from the start. ]
entries.name: Aalto and Shorekeeper

entries.content: [ Aalto and Verina: Aalto views Verina: That little girl from Rigg's Explorers? Yeah, I bumped into her once, back in the New Federation. Offered me a Starflower for the whereabouts of her mother. But the deal fell through, because she didn't have what I was asking for. And what was that, Rover ask? Well, I asked for a never-withering flower. In reply, she told me plants have their life cycle, and wilting is just a natural part of it. ]
entries.name: Aalto and Verina

entries.content: [ Aalto and Xiangli Yao: Xiangli Yao views Aalto: Aalto once approached me with an offer from the Black Shores, but I declined. Life at the Academy suits me well. Though his manner may seem unserious, Aalto has a sharp eye for valuable information and connections for rare materials. I've frequently relied on his services. ]
entries.name: Aalto and Xiangli Yao

entries.content: [ Aalto and Yangyang: Aalto views Yangyang: Miss Yangyang? We haven't talked much, but the way she can tap into the "Streams" for intel is definitely something. I ought to see if she's interested in being my informant. ]
entries.name: Aalto and Yangyang

entries.content: [ Augusta: Septimont leader and arena figure; civic authority, public courage, and the burden of power define her place in Septimont. Appearance: Tall and sharp, with red-orange hair, sun-bright eyes, sunburst headwear, a white-and-gold tailored armor dress, and a blade-bearing silhouette that makes her look like living Septimont radiance. ]
entries.name: Character: Augusta

entries.content: [ Avidius: Septimont figure remembered for defying fate with fierce resolve before being silenced. Appearance: Blond and blue-eyed, wearing ornate white, gold, and purple ceremonial armor with gold bracers, round shoulder ornaments, purple tassels, and a polished noble bearing. ]
entries.name: Character: Avidius

entries.content: [ Carlotta: Montelli woman from Ragunna; elegant, determined, bound by family duty, and watched closely because her choices can alter the Montelli family's future. Appearance: Long white-silver hair, pale skin, cool blue-pink eyes, crimson finery over a white dress, opal adornments, elegant gloves, and hidden weapons such as a pistol, ammunition bag, and perfume-bottle grenade beneath the glamour. ]
entries.name: Character: Carlotta

entries.content: [ Chisa: young woman from Ashinohara and Startorch Academy student; quiet, intense, mechanically perceptive, and bound to the Lahai-Roi student circle. Appearance: Waist-length shiny black hair, red pupils, a long red ribbon at her right temple, a neutral expression, and an old black Startorch Academy uniform with a loose coat and red neck scarf. ]
entries.name: Character: Chisa

entries.content: [ Ciaccona: Rinascita bard and singer; carries old folklore, knightly tales, musical memory, and Ragunna performance culture. Appearance: Red-haired and green-eyed, with elf-like ears, two uneven antlers, traveler-performer clothing in teal and white, a removable cloak, and a stringed instrument ready for spontaneous songs. ]
entries.name: Character: Ciaccona

entries.content: [ Cristoforo: person centered on free will, truth, survival, and mankind's ability to confront the world without illusion. Appearance: Blond and green-eyed, often seen in a red-and-black wide hat, black-and-gold masquerade mask, white high collar, red armor-like coat, and dark feathered trim; unmasked, he keeps the same polished theatrical bearing. ]
entries.name: Character: Cristoforo

entries.content: [ Denia: person harmed by a Fractsidus plot in Lahai-Roi's conflicts; Hiyuki carries guilt and grief over Denia's suffering. Appearance: Pale, pink-haired, and doll-like, with long curled strands, blue-purple eyes, a white dress with black skirt accents, a pink outer garment lined in starry blue, red gloves, chain and blue-gem accessories, and a small dark doll charm. ]
entries.name: Character: Denia

entries.content: [ Gardenia: one of Cantarella's sea-creature-named companions, paired with Rosemary in Cantarella's household imagery. ]
entries.name: Character: Gardenia

entries.content: [ Jianxin: Taoist woman with a pure mind, open perception, discipline, and an untamed spirit noticed by others. Appearance: A calm black-haired martial artist in green, white, and black Taoist-style clothing, with flowing sleeves, wraps, and a balanced stance that emphasizes disciplined internal strength. ]
entries.name: Character: Jianxin

entries.content: [ Lillibet: Iuno's grandmother and Tetragon Temple authority; teacher of fate, priestess expectations, and Septimont duty. Appearance: An elderly priestess figure with light-blue hair, glasses, an ornate crown-like headpiece set with a blue gem, layered white-and-blue temple robes, gold details, and a golden branch-like staff. ]
entries.name: Character: Lillibet

entries.content: [ Lingyang: lion dance performer with lively movement, striking stage presence, and a small but impressive physical style. Appearance: A short white-haired lion-dance performer with lion-like ears and tail elements, a black-white-gold-orange fur-trimmed outfit, and a compact acrobatic stage presence. ]
entries.name: Character: Lingyang

entries.content: [ Lucilla: President of Startorch Academy; practical adult, institutional leader, and person who understands both her own aims and others' expectations. Appearance: Long blue-purple hair under a broad dark hat, a blue-white-black asymmetrical high-fashion outfit with diamond-patterned panels, gloves, heels, and a handbag, looking like an academy president with a designer's eye. ]
entries.name: Character: Lucilla

entries.content: [ Mya: Septimont contender remembered for raw determination in arena footage and for what her struggle means to Lupa's understanding of teammates. Appearance: Pale and somber, with short light-blue-white hair, gray-green eyes, a brimmed cap with coral-like markings, a blue scarf or capelet, and a sleeveless blue outfit. ]
entries.name: Character: Mya

entries.content: [ Phoebe: kind Ragunna acolyte with gentle manner, strong knowledge of the Order's doctrines, and unusual respect for the will of Ragunna's people. Appearance: A blonde young lady with purple eyes, a wide-brimmed white hat, white-and-blue Acolyte clothing, a heavy tome held with priestess-like reverence, and a staff capped by a bird-like head. ]
entries.name: Character: Phoebe

entries.content: [ Rhein Herssen: Luuk Herssen's adoptive brother; truth-seeker remembered by Luuk as someone who could have become a brilliant painter. ]
entries.name: Character: Rhein Herssen

entries.content: [ Roccia: young First Mate of the Troupe of Fools; carries a giant box, uses fireworks, gives performance advice, designs stages, and supports the troupe's theatrical life. Appearance: Petite and brightly colored, with blue-pink hair in a large ponytail, gold-pink eyes, elaborate purple-and-blue performer clothing, a rakish masquerade mask headpiece, and an enormous magical suitcase companion. ]
entries.name: Character: Roccia

entries.content: [ Rosemary: one of Cantarella's sea-creature-named companions, paired with Gardenia in Cantarella's household imagery. Appearance: A lavender-haired attendant in a white, purple, and dark maid-like dress with bonnet, gloves, heeled shoes, and an orb-topped cane or staff, giving her a composed household-retainer look. ]
entries.name: Character: Rosemary

entries.content: [ Rover: black-haired, golden-eyed wanderer whose presence affects many Resonators; Cantarella compares Rover to an immortal jellyfish bringing gentle light through darkness. Appearance: The Rover can appear in male or female form; both visual references share dark hair, golden eyes, black-white-gold traveler combat clothing, gloves, and a sword-focused wanderer silhouette. ]
entries.name: Character: Rover

entries.content: [ Sanhua: Jinhsi's composed, silent bodyguard; vigilant, burdened, and trusted by Jinhsi and Changli. Appearance: White-haired and cool-eyed, wearing a black outfit with a beret-like headpiece, black stockings, gloves, and a large sword that reinforces her quiet bodyguard severity. ]
entries.name: Character: Sanhua

entries.content: [ Scar: Fractsidus madman with unpredictable behavior, disdain for rules, and a manner Phrolova finds distasteful. Appearance: White-haired with a red streak, red eyes, gold earrings, and a red, white, and black high-collared outfit; his sharp grin and vivid colors make him immediately look unstable and dangerous. ]
entries.name: Character: Scar

entries.content: [ Schwarzloch: Schwarzloch, also called the Grand Architect: singular Fractsidus figure who serves as a living purpose and point of reference for Phrolova. Appearance: A largely hidden hooded figure in dark purple-red robes, with the face obscured by shadow and a staff or polearm silhouette, making the Grand Architect appear more like an ominous symbol than an ordinary person. ]
entries.name: Character: Schwarzloch

entries.content: [ Sigrika: disciplined Startorch Academy student and young Solsworn candidate with bright orange hair worn in long fluffy braids down her back, expectant eyes, pale head ornaments, a tidy white-and-purple Roya/Startorch outfit, and intricate Royan runes across her body as the Sun's blessing marking adulthood. She carries a burden too heavy for her age, but keeps her serious composure while trying to live up to those expectations. ]
entries.name: Character: Sigrika

entries.content: [ Taoqi: efficient Jinzhou worker able to handle large workloads despite sleepy manner and frequent yawns. Appearance: A sleepy-looking pink-haired woman in a black, pink, and gray outfit, carrying a large blade and balancing a relaxed expression with a surprisingly sturdy combat silhouette. ]
entries.name: Character: Taoqi

entries.content: [ Yinlin: undercover agent who infiltrated Calcharo's group and once appeared to Chixia as a thunderous ideal. Appearance: Tall and red-haired, wearing a striking black-and-red outfit with high heels, puppet-string and cord motifs, and a poised undercover-agent look that mixes elegance with danger. ]
entries.name: Character: Yinlin

entries.content: [ Aemeath identity: Aemeath is a Resonator with Fusion frequency who uses uses Sword. Resonator classification: Natural. Title: Guiding Starlance. Alias: Fleet Snowfluff. Affiliation: Startorch Academy, Roya Tribe. Origin: Roya Frostlands. Nation: Lahai-Roi. She is a Frostlands native from the Roya Tribe who was once a Synchronist at Startorch Academy. She became the Exostrider's Resonator after overclocking in order to resonate with it, causing her to lose her body. She now roams throughout Lahai-Roi as a digital ghost invisible to everyone aro ]
entries.name: Aemeath identity

entries.content: [ Aemeath appearance: Aemeath is a tall woman with fair skin, golden eyes, and bright yellow star-shaped pupils. Her hair is tied into a high pink ponytail that fades to lemon yellow at the ends, with shoulder-length front locks, a blue digital halo with wing motifs, and a wing-shaped hairclip at her left bang. Her Tacet Mark sits high on her chest below the collarbone, framed by a blue heart tattoo. ]
entries.name: Aemeath appearance

entries.content: [ Aemeath Forte: Associated Forte or power: Guiding Starlance. [Retrieved from the Spacetrek Collective records: Startorch Academy ]
entries.name: Aemeath Forte

entries.content: [ Aemeath resonance stability: Rabelle's Waveform test sample analysis shows an elliptical oscillation pattern and a stable Time Domain. No abnormal fluctuations were observed. Examination results are determined to be within normal parameters. Conclusion: Resonant Criticality is within normal range. Subject stability remains robust. No history of and no present risk of Overclocking ]
entries.name: Aemeath resonance stability

entries.content: [ Aemeath personality: Aemeath, once a Synchronist at Startorch Academy, is now a digital ghost visible to none. She has a bubbly personality and a wide range of interests; she enjoys campus life and wants to share her joy with others. ]
entries.name: Aemeath personality

entries.content: [ Aemeath affiliations: Aemeath belongs to Startorch Academy, Roya Tribe. Important place context: Roya Frostlands, Lahai-Roi. She became the Exostrider's Resonator after overclocking in order to resonate with it, causing her to lose her body. Once an Exostrider Synchronist of Rabelle College, she is now a digital ghost who sings quietly amongst stars. ]
entries.name: Aemeath affiliations

entries.content: [ Aemeath history: Aemeath, once a Synchronist at Startorch Academy, is now a digital ghost visible to none. She has a bubbly personality and a wide range of interests; she enjoys campus life and wants to share her joy with others. She is a Frostlands native from the Roya Tribe who was once a Synchronist at Startorch Academy. She became the Exostrider's Resonator after overclocking in order to resonate with it, causing her to lose her body. On the Frostlands: A snowflake landed on Aemeath's nose, a cold, wet tickle. She stared at the lake for a moment ]
entries.name: Aemeath history

entries.content: [ Aemeath and Camellya: Aemeath views Camellya: I used to chase Exoswarm across the frostlands with Camellya! She's really good at gaming, too. Ha, I wish we could gather for a rematch someday. ]
entries.name: Aemeath and Camellya

entries.content: [ Aemeath and Exostrider: Aemeath views Exostrider: For years after becoming a digital ghost, I would journey to the frostlands just to see it. It always stood there, silent, motionless in the snow, and I would stand beside it, quietly watching. At a time before the dawn of Lahai-Roi ]
entries.name: Aemeath and Exostrider

entries.content: [ Aemeath and Hiyuki: Hiyuki views Aemeath: A resilient child. She surely endured unimaginable hardship to return here. When she vanished within the simulator cockpit, I was out on a field assignment. The investigation team later briefed me on her case. The detail that made me pause was her writing "saving the world" as her career aspiration Hm, I find myself wondering what in her upbringing instilled this level of conviction? ]
entries.name: Aemeath and Hiyuki

entries.content: [ Aemeath and Luuk Herssen: Aemeath views Luuk Herssen: Dr. Luuk is kind and competent, admired by many students. But he wasn't always this way. He used to carry a constant tension, as if bracing for battle at any moment. Perhaps the change came when Rover invited him to Lahai-Roi ]
entries.name: Aemeath and Luuk Herssen

entries.content: [ Aemeath and Mornye: Aemeath views Mornye: The first time I met Professor Mornye was when Rover took me to the Academy, right before Rover left Lahai-Roi ]
entries.name: Aemeath and Mornye

entries.content: [ Aemeath and Shorekeeper: Aemeath views Shorekeeper: On nights filled with Rover's sighs, I used to sneak near Rover's desk, catching snippets of Rover's conversations with her. Shorekeeper, yes, that's her name. Whenever Rover talked with her, the weight in Rover's breath would lift. ]
entries.name: Aemeath and Shorekeeper

entries.content: [ Baizhi: researcher with reserved manner, careful judgment, and strong reliance on observation, data, and study near Huaxu Academy's scientific world. Appearance: Tall and reserved, with long black hair, a white-black-green researcher outfit, gloves, and the pale creature You'tan hovering near her like a living scientific companion. ]
entries.name: Character: Baizhi

entries.content: [ Encore: Black Shores girl with boundless energy, imagination, affection for stories, easy friendship, and an adventurous view of the world. Appearance: A small pink-haired girl in a black, white, and pink outfit, usually framed by her black and white Wooly plush companions, making her look playful and storybook-bright. ]
entries.name: Character: Encore

entries.content: [ Jiyan: General of the Jinzhou Garrison; capable commander, border defender, and protector whose duty centers on military judgment and Jinzhou's safety. Appearance: Tall and commanding, with teal hair, a dark green-and-black general's coat, armor-like layers, a spear, and green energy motifs that mark him as a battlefield leader. ]
entries.name: Character: Jiyan

entries.content: [ Verina: young botanist and prodigy from Rigg's Explorers who once searched for her mother in the New Federation. Appearance: Small and youthful, with blonde hair touched by green, a green-and-white botanical outfit, plant motifs, and explorer-botanist details that make her look like a walking sprout. ]
entries.name: Character: Verina

entries.content: [ Yangyang: gentle woman whose speech, songs, and access to the Streams leave strong impressions around Jinzhou. Appearance: Dark navy-haired and gentle, wearing a black-and-blue feathered outfit with elegant hair ornaments and wind-borne styling that suits her soft, flowing presence. ]
entries.name: Character: Yangyang

entries.content: [ Brant identity: Brant is a Resonator with Fusion frequency who uses uses Sword. Resonator classification: Natural. Title: Flamebound Compass. Real name: Tern Brant. Affiliation: Ragunna, Troupe of Fools. Origin: Rinascita. He is the captain of the Troupe of Fools, exuding a carefree, easygoing charm and charisma, unbound by convention. However, beneath his flamboyant persona lies a kind heart deeply devoted to ensuring his crew's safety and freedom. ]
entries.name: Brant identity

entries.content: [ Brant appearance: Brant is a young man of average height with short turquoise hair streaked with fuchsia and vivid fuchsia eyes. His Tacet Mark sits on the inner area of his left pectoral. He dresses like a flamboyant pirate captain in a baggy dark-green shirt split by black frills and red flame patterns, a high red-and-gold checker collar, black-and-gold pauldrons, belts, sashes, and an open torso that makes his stage-ready confidence immediately visible. ]
entries.name: Brant appearance

entries.content: [ Brant Forte: Associated Forte or power: Flamebound Compass. [Troupe Medic Benir's Notes (Unnumbered)]. I still recall that night as if it were yesterday. My first real trial after joining the troupe. Storm clouds blanketed the sea, and rain pounded down in sheets while monstrous waves threatened to capsize our ship at any moment. We were tossed about like driftwood, the helmswoman lost in the chaos, the ship spinning through the tempest. I huddled in the cabin, trembling as fear seeped through me. Then I saw him. There, atop the mast, stood the captain. ]
entries.name: Brant Forte

entries.content: [ Brant resonance stability: [The Troupe of Fools "Revel in Freedom" Tour - Ragunna Stop Application]. Lead Performer: Brant. The subject's waveform graph shows elliptical fluctuations. The Time Domain pattern is regular, and no signs of abnormal fluctuations are observed. The test results fall within the normal phase range. Resonant Criticality: High. This test subject displays high stability with a low risk of Overclocking. Records indicate no history of Overclocking. Approval Verdict: Stable. The Troupe of Fools' application ]
entries.name: Brant resonance stability

entries.content: [ Brant personality: Brant has a boundless passion and theatrical flair, embodying both the performer and the dreamer in equal measure. As the captain of Rinascita's Troupe of Fools, he thrives in chaos, reveling in the unpredictable nature of both the stage and life itself. His charisma is effortless; larger than life yet never insincere. He is a free spirit who dances between the whimsical and the profound, unafraid to embrace the absurd yet always carrying a quiet depth beneath his exuberance. ]
entries.name: Brant personality

entries.content: [ Brant affiliations: Brant belongs to Ragunna, Troupe of Fools. Important place context: Rinascita. ]
entries.name: Brant affiliations

entries.content: [ Brant history: As captain of the Fool's Troupe, Brant exudes a carefree, easygoing charm, unbound by convention. Beneath his flamboyant persona lies a genuine heart, deeply devoted to his family and companions. He is the captain of the Troupe of Fools, exuding a carefree, easygoing charm and charisma, unbound by convention. However, beneath his flamboyant persona lies a kind heart deeply devoted to ensuring his crew's safety and freedom. An Improvised Afternoon at the Tavern: A crack of thunder shattered the bartender's rhythm as he shook the cocktail mi ]
entries.name: Brant history

entries.content: [ Brant and Carlotta: Brant views Carlotta: She's got her course set and sticks to it, no matter what. Living as a Montelli is no easy path, but she's determined to make her own way. And mark my words, when her performances draw to a close, she'll be known not just as a Montelli, but Carlotta. ]
entries.name: Brant and Carlotta

entries.content: [ Brant and Cartethyia: Brant views Cartethyia: Some call her a saint; others, a sinner. But who is she really? No one cares how she treats her friends or faces her foes. The Order's tales never speak of her dreams, and the legends conceal her heart's desire. Everyone has heard of Cartethyia, but does anyone know the person behind that name? ]
entries.name: Brant and Cartethyia

entries.content: [ Brant and Lupa: Lupa views Brant: Many Gladiators of the Blue Furies come from the Troupe of Fools. I remember once, at Cliffside Harbor, I saw their captain leap off the deck just to hug his crew. They chattered on for a while, and then suddenly broke into song,! ]
entries.name: Brant and Lupa

entries.content: [ Brant and Roccia: Brant views Roccia: Don't be fooled by our First Mate's age, if Rover ever need performance advice, she's Rover's go-to. Plus, she's also an excellent stage designer! ]
entries.name: Brant and Roccia

entries.content: [ Brant and Zani: Brant views Zani: Many wear masks to fit in, but not her. Whatever her past, whatever roles she's played, she's here now, true to herself. Zani views Brant: Brant is a skilled actor, a respected captain, and a fighter willing to sacrifice everything for truth and justice. But what I envy most is that he's never weighed down by stacks of paperwork. If I knew anything about acting, I'd quit this job, join the Troupe of Fools, and live the carefree life he does Now, now. Just a pipe dream to keep me going. ]
entries.name: Brant and Zani

key: Ghost Hounds Jinzhou Lawless Zone formerly Underdogs formerly
entries.content: [ Calcharo identity: Calcharo is a Resonator with Electro frequency who uses uses Broadblade. Resonator classification: Natural. Title: Phantom Hunters. Affiliation: Ghost Hounds, Jinzhou, Lawless Zone (formerly), Underdogs (formerly). Origin: New Federation. He is a former Exile from the New Federation's Lawless Zone and the leader of the Ghost Hounds. ]
entries.name: Calcharo identity
keys: Ghost Hounds Jinzhou Lawless Zone formerly Underdogs formerly

entries.content: [ Calcharo appearance: Calcharo is a tall, slightly muscular pale man with sharp angular features, tired light-blue eyes, and very long bluish-gray hair that falls near his knees. His Tacet Mark lies horizontally across his forehead. He wears a dark military bodysuit with navy straps, white shoulder armor, a cyan sash, belts, black coattails, gloves, boots, and a weapon-focused silhouette that reinforces his severe mercenary presence. ]
entries.name: Calcharo appearance

entries.content: [ Calcharo Forte: Associated Forte or power: Phantom Hunters. Evaluation Basis: [Resonance Assessment 2300-G]. The Time of Awakening for Resonator Calcharo remains unclear. According to Calcharo's report, he endured extended periods in hostile environments and faced numerous life-threatening situations. As a result, his Forte naturally awakened as a means of self-protection. Resonator Calcharo's Tacet Mark is located on his forehead. When Calcharo activates his Forte, a golden core manifests on his chest. Concurrently, various parts of his body displa ]
entries.name: Calcharo Forte

entries.content: [ Calcharo resonance stability: Resonator Calcharo's waveform graph shows zigzag fluctuations. The pattern of Time Domain is irregular. Both the upper and lower peak values are high and manifest proximity to the Criticality level. The waveform displays segments of partial fuzziness and abnormal waveform can be seen. Resonance Criticality: Relatively high, combined with extremely low stability. Risk of Overclocking is substantial. Resonator Calcharo has a known history of Overclocking. Maximum recorded Overclocking rating: S ]
entries.name: Calcharo resonance stability

entries.content: [ Calcharo personality: Due to the many betrayals, hardships, loss, competition that has plagued him since his early years, Calcharo is an aloof, serious, but determined man who displays experiences through his speech and fights. His fierce reputation as a mercenary has garnered attention from many people from internationally and also generated absurd and exaggerated rumors about him. Calcharo's is a committed mercenary who tries to ensure satisfaction for both parties, in exchange for what he deems a fair price. ]
entries.name: Calcharo personality

entries.content: [ Calcharo affiliations: Calcharo belongs to Ghost Hounds, Jinzhou, Lawless Zone (formerly), Underdogs (formerly). Important place context: New Federation. His Forte allows him to summon a special Tacet Discord to assist his assault on the targets. ]
entries.name: Calcharo affiliations

entries.content: [ Calcharo history: He is a former Exile from the New Federation's Lawless Zone and the leader of the Ghost Hounds. Dogs of War": Calcharo "the Vicious" was once one of the Exiles in the New Federation's Lawless Zone. He has long mastered all kinds of insidious strategies to survive. Nowadays, he has grown even more ruthless for his mercenary: Poisoning, assassination, bribery, kidnapping, bombs He'd do whatever he found necessary to get the job done. Quid Pro Quo: Calcharo started from scratch but made his reputation in only a few short years. His ]
entries.name: Calcharo history

entries.content: [ Calcharo and Aalto: Calcharo views Aalto: Need to reach Aalto? Here's his contact. Mention my name for a twenty percent discount. Aalto views Calcharo: I always enjoy doing business with a Ghost Hound. They keep things clean, They're straightforward, and they don't goof around. ]
entries.name: Calcharo and Aalto

entries.content: [ Calcharo and Jiyan: Calcharo views Jiyan: He's a capable leader. He once recommended me an ancient tome on the art of war from Huanglong, one that I regret not acquiring sooner-it could have saved me some effort. As for the deal between us scoff It was merely an exchange of interests. Nothing more. ]
entries.name: Calcharo and Jiyan

entries.content: [ Calcharo and Mortefi: Calcharo views Mortefi: Pretentious, arrogant, and self-absorbed That man epitomizes every trait of those snooty New Federation nobles. That said, I cannot deny his talent in crafting Tacetite Weapons. I can arrange a meeting with our trusted arms dealer, if he's interested. ]
entries.name: Calcharo and Mortefi

entries.content: [ Calcharo and Verina: Calcharo views Verina: I met her once. A prodigy in the field of botany at such a young age Impressive. ]
entries.name: Calcharo and Verina

entries.content: [ Calcharo and Yinlin: Calcharo views Yinlin: Yinlin? That undercover agent who infiltrated my group? huff Easy there. I didn't give her a hard time, provided she always stayed in her lane. ]
entries.name: Calcharo and Yinlin

entries.content: [ Camellya identity: Camellya is a Resonator with Havoc frequency who uses uses Sword. Resonator classification: Artificial. Title: Sanguine Blossom. Affiliation: Black Shores. Origin: Unknown. Nation: The Black Shores. She is a Bloom Bearer of the Black Shores, and handles the combat-oriented germination tests given to new candidates. However, she refuses all sense of responsibility, delighting in satiating her unquenchable thirst for battle and personal amusement. In pursuit of the thrill of a fight, she gleefully abandons the risks to her li ]
entries.name: Camellya identity

entries.content: [ Camellya appearance: Camellya is a short young woman with white hair streaked black and worn in twintails, dark gray eyes, and red diamond-shaped pupils. She wears a short ruffled white dress with red, gold, and black accents, asymmetrical white stockings, and black Blake Bloom flower motifs worked through her outfit. The flower-and-vine details make her look delicate at first glance, but they also echo the dangerous corruption and obsession tied to her Resonance. ]
entries.name: Camellya appearance

entries.content: [ Camellya Forte: Associated Forte or power: Sanguine Blossom. [Resonance Assessment 2███-G]. The exact timing of Resonator Camellya's Awakening is unclear due to her ███ disorder. She has been capable of utilizing her Forte since Awakening. Resonator Camellya's Tacet Mark is located on her chest. Following her Awakening, her body has exhibited clear signs of vegetative somatization. Both her right arm and head show alterations, with the degree of change intensifying alongside frequency fluctuations. Camellya's Resonance Spectrum Pattern closely resem ]
entries.name: Camellya Forte

entries.content: [ Camellya resonance stability: Resonator Camellya's waveform graph exhibits needle-like fluctuations. The Time Domain pattern reveals intense, chaotic activity, with an extremely high frequency. During testing, the Time Domain data displayed significant distortion, and the peak value remains indeterminable. Resonant Criticality: Low. Resonator Camellya's frequency displays extremely low stability, with a high risk of Overclocking. Resonator Camellya has a known history of Overclocking. Maximum recorded Overclocking rating: ]
entries.name: Camellya resonance stability

entries.content: [ Camellya personality: At Camellya's core, she is someone who seeks entertainment and fun for her own amusement. In contrast to her fellow Black Shore members, Camellya views her employment as an obligation and little else. She is a hedonist that has a great joy for finding those she considers "promising seeds", and hunts them down to sate her pleasure in battle. She extends this interest in not just recruits the Tethys System considers as candidates, but also civilians and criminals. ]
entries.name: Camellya personality

entries.content: [ Camellya affiliations: Camellya belongs to Black Shores. Important place context: Unknown, The Black Shores. ]
entries.name: Camellya affiliations

entries.content: [ Camellya history: Bloom Bearer from the Black Shores, Camellya is a laid-back character free from shackles, with her personal aroma of 'danger.' Intrigued by the belief in fate, she wanders the lands of her own accord, following such a chain of scenarios and its vague guidance. She is a Bloom Bearer of the Black Shores, and handles the combat-oriented germination tests given to new candidates. However, she refuses all sense of responsibility, delighting in satiating her unquenchable thirst for battle and personal amusement. To the Days Ahead: She aw ]
entries.name: Camellya history

entries.content: [ Camellya and Aalto: Camellya views Aalto: Aalto's a master at mind games. It's hard to get under his skin! He's not strong enough to pique my interest though. That guy relies on trickery too much for my liking. ]
entries.name: Camellya and Aalto

entries.content: [ Camellya and Aemeath: Aemeath views Camellya: I used to chase Exoswarm across the frostlands with Camellya! She's really good at gaming, too. Ha, I wish we could gather for a rematch someday. ]
entries.name: Camellya and Aemeath

entries.content: [ Camellya and Encore: Camellya views Encore: Encore. Ah, that girl who loves stories! I hope she'll mature into a strong opponent one day, then we'll have so much fun together. ]
entries.name: Camellya and Encore

entries.content: [ Camellya and Jianxin: Camellya views Jianxin: That girl, the Taoist? She's a fun one to watch. She may seem to follow human society's boring norms, but her untamed spirit still shines through every now and then. ]
entries.name: Camellya and Jianxin

entries.content: [ Camellya and Jinhsi: Camellya views Jinhsi: The Loong Maiden of Jinzhou reminds me of the Shorekeeper, the way they're oh-so-devoted to their duties, all the self-sacrifice! I don't understand, why has to they burden themselves so much? ]
entries.name: Camellya and Jinhsi

entries.content: [ Camellya and Shorekeeper: Camellya views Shorekeeper: She's always so serious, following every rule despite being our de facto leader now. Well, she's taken care of me before on many occassions, so I gotta show some respect Wait, I've been a Bloom Bearer for years? How time flies ]
entries.name: Camellya and Shorekeeper

key: Sea of Dreams Head of Fisalia Matriarch of Fisalia The Bane Blessed Maiden
entries.content: [ Cantarella identity: Cantarella is a Resonator with Havoc frequency who uses uses Rectifier. Resonator classification: Unclear. Title: Sea of Dreams, Head of Fisalia, Matriarch of Fisalia, The Bane, Blessed Maiden. Real name: Cantarella Fisalia. Affiliation: Fisalia Family, Ragunna. Origin: Rinascita. Nation: Rinascita. She is the thirty-sixth matriarch of the Fisalia family, and the former Blessed Maiden of Imperator. Her elegant, composed demeanor and captivating beauty conceal a dark and disturbing past, of which she is steadfastly searching for the means to ]
entries.name: Cantarella identity
keys: Sea of Dreams Head of Fisalia Matriarch of Fisalia The Bane Blessed Maiden

entries.content: [ Cantarella appearance: Cantarella is a tall fair-skinned woman with vibrant blue eyes and lavender hair accented by pale blue tones. Her refined Rinascita styling uses cool blue-violet, oceanic, and pearl-like details that support her House Fisalia and sea-creature imagery. Her Tacet Mark is hidden on the top of her tongue, making even her most elegant presentation carry an unsettling private edge. ]
entries.name: Cantarella appearance

entries.content: [ Cantarella Forte: Associated Forte or power: Sea of Dreams. Fisalia Apothecary Rosemary's Examination Record: Special Edition Approved by the Family Head. It is clear that the current head of the Fisalia family, Lady Cantarella, represents the pinnacle of the family's poison-related Forte. It is a great honor to have been invited to the castle to conduct her checkup, as well as to have been granted unrestricted access to the garden of Porto-Veno Castle for research purposes. Lady Cantarella's ability is a rare form of hallucinogenic toxin, distinct from the more commo ]
entries.name: Cantarella Forte

entries.content: [ Cantarella resonance stability: Level: Top Secret. Fisalia Butler Sebastian's Record: Family Head's Mental Health Management. Childhood experiences, the trials, and the prolonged use of her Forte "Sea of Dreams" have caused irreparable damage to both Milady's mind and body. At present, part of her frequency record is missing. Judging by the waveform increments, the missing part is meant to be steep, bordering on the threshold of Overclocking. The remaining waveforms exhibit a rare form of bipolar divergence, and at its worst, several distinct waveforms ]
entries.name: Cantarella resonance stability

entries.content: [ Cantarella personality: Beneath this, Cantarella has a nurturing and protective instinct, albeit expressed through her own unique filter of poisons and illusions. She offers solutions to others and wants them to be at peace, albeit in unusual ways. This nurturing is offered to Rover, who she sees as an "immortal jellyfish" banishing shadows with a "gentle light", a grounding force giving her "peace and happiness". ]
entries.name: Cantarella personality

entries.content: [ Cantarella affiliations: Cantarella belongs to Fisalia Family, Ragunna. Important place context: Rinascita, Rinascita. She is the thirty-sixth matriarch of the Fisalia family, and the former Blessed Maiden of Imperator. ]
entries.name: Cantarella affiliations

entries.content: [ Cantarella history: The Fisalia family's thirty-sixth head, Cantarella Fisalia. She locks Rover's gaze with eyes as deep as the ocean, where dark tides seem to surge and swirl. She is the thirty-sixth matriarch of the Fisalia family, and the former Blessed Maiden of Imperator. Her elegant, composed demeanor and captivating beauty conceal a dark and disturbing past, of which she is steadfastly searching for the means to liberate herself and her lineage. Round Table: The light filtered through the stained glass, casting a speckled pattern across the crimson sofa. Dim ]
entries.name: Cantarella history

entries.content: [ Cantarella and Carlotta: Cantarella views Carlotta: Even in shackles, she dances elegantly, a true Montelli, yet more than that. Where will her choices lead her family? How delightful to imagine how she might present herself when next we meet. ]
entries.name: Cantarella and Carlotta

entries.content: [ Cantarella and Cartethyia: Cantarella views Cartethyia: She accomplished the impossible, reclaiming her humanity from the cage of a Divinity's vessel. When the Carnevale petals fall upon Ragunna's streets again, the Holy Maiden will at last be herself. Cartethyia views Cantarella: I took away the brilliant future she was meant to have. The future of being the Sentinel's true Blessed Maiden. All the goodwill and hopes placed upon me, and the power I now possess all of it was meant to have belonged to Cantarella. Yet, she never seemed bothered by it. Someone as mat ]
entries.name: Cantarella and Cartethyia

entries.content: [ Cantarella and Gardenia: Cantarella views Gardenia: A lively Starfish and a gentle Sea Bunny But I has to admit, I can't tell them apart. ]
entries.name: Cantarella and Gardenia

entries.content: [ Cantarella and Rosemary: Cantarella views Rosemary: A lively Starfish and a gentle Sea Bunny But I has to admit, I can't tell them apart. ]
entries.name: Cantarella and Rosemary

entries.content: [ Cantarella and Roccia: Cantarella views Roccia: The little girl with a giant box who plays with fireworks? A fascinating child. I wonder if bringing her into this castle would liven it up a little. Oh relax, I'm only teasing. ]
entries.name: Cantarella and Roccia

entries.content: [ Cantarella and Rover: Cantarella views Rover: Hmm, what would be a fitting analogy perhaps an immortal jellyfish? Like these delicate, shimmering creatures roving alone in the darkness, they dispel shadows with their gentle light, inch by inch, until the end of time. ]
entries.name: Cantarella and Rover

entries.content: [ Cantarella and Zani: Zani views Cantarella: The Fisalia family has always clung to Ragunna's traditions, stubbornly resisting change. But Signorina Cantarella, the current head, isn't as traditional as people imagine. As an employee, I do not get to influence how the Montellis handle their relationship with the Fisalias but personally, I wouldn't mind working with her. ]
entries.name: Cantarella and Zani

key: Feathered Tempest The Blessed Maiden Blessed Maiden of the Order of the Deep Queen of Gale and Tide Enlightened One
Ragunna Order of the Deep formerly

Title: Feathered Tempest, The Blessed Maiden, Blessed Maiden of the Order of the Deep, Queen of Gale and Tide, Enlightened One.
