entries.content: [ Cartethyia appearance: Cartethyia is a rather short young woman with pale skin, long light-blonde hair divided by three braids, blue eyes, and pointed elf-like ears. She wears short white vestments over a short black dress with an exposed back, held by a black collar with gold buckles and long white tippet-like cloth panels marked by golden fleur-de-lis symbols. Thin black straps, gold trim, and sacred vestment details give her a gentle but ritualized knightly appearance. ]
entries.name: Cartethyia appearance

entries.content: [ Cartethyia Forte: Associated Forte or power: Feathered Tempest. [Resonance Evaluation Report RA-X006]. It is speculated that due to the opposing influences exerted by Sentinel Imperator and Threnodian Leviathan, Cartethyia's Spectrum Performance data exceeds standard values by ▇▇▇▇▇▇▇. Calculation of accurate data using existing methods is impossible. Therefore, Cartethyia is classified as a Congenital Resonator. Her file has been sealed under a special project group. Access clearance: ▇▇▇. ]
entries.name: Cartethyia Forte

entries.content: [ Cartethyia resonance stability: Cartethyia's waveform graph shows elliptical fluctuations with a stable Time Domain. Peak values between upper and lower bounds show intermittent upward trends, with peak values not yet exceeding critical threshold. No abnormal fluctuations have been observed. Stability is high with minimal risk of Overclocking. However, it is worth noting that Cartethyia's body shows unstable power fluctuations when distant from Rinascita. It is likely emphasized that this is not a case of Overclocking, but rather the precise invocation ]
entries.name: Cartethyia resonance stability

entries.content: [ Cartethyia personality: Cartethyia's torn nature is traced to her origins: she was formed through the Threnodian's curse and malice, a "malicious creation" which ironically had her wear the crown of the Blessed Maiden. This natural connection to both the destructive Threnodian and the protective Sentinel indicates she possesses great, volatile power. This combination is not a weakness but a unique strength, permitting her "Second Awakening" to change at will between two forms, a reflection of her precise mastery of these opposing powers. ]
entries.name: Cartethyia personality

entries.content: [ Cartethyia affiliations: Cartethyia belongs to Ragunna, Order of the Deep (formerly). Important place context: Rinascita, Rinascita. Throughout Rinascita, she is revered as Fleurdelys, the "Blessed Maiden," and in some accounts, "The Martyred Maiden." As a key figure in the region's history, she holds profound influence, with her connections to the Sentinel Imperator, the Threnodian Leviathan, and the Dark Tide. ]
entries.name: Cartethyia affiliations

entries.content: [ Cartethyia history: The powers of the Sentinel and Threnodian clash and unite within her, propelling her into an uncertain future. Whether the future is bright or dim, she will hold the blade firmly and confront all that comes her way. Throughout Rinascita, she is revered as Fleurdelys, the "Blessed Maiden," and in some accounts, "The Martyred Maiden." As a key figure in the region's history, she holds profound influence, with her connections to the Sentinel Imperator, the Threnodian Leviathan, and the Dark Tide. The Knight's Faded Hours: A retired dramatist enjoys t ]
entries.name: Cartethyia history

entries.content: [ Cartethyia and Brant: Brant views Cartethyia: Some call her a saint; others, a sinner. But who is she really? No one cares how she treats her friends or faces her foes. The Order's tales never speak of her dreams, and the legends conceal her heart's desire. Everyone has heard of Cartethyia, but does anyone know the person behind that name? ]
entries.name: Cartethyia and Brant

entries.content: [ Cartethyia and Cantarella: Cartethyia views Cantarella: I took away the brilliant future she was meant to have. The future of being the Sentinel's true Blessed Maiden. All the goodwill and hopes placed upon me, and the power I now possess all of it was meant to have belonged to Cantarella. Yet, she never seemed bothered by it. Someone as mature as her likely has already found her own path within the Fisalia family. But still, I'll always remember that I owe her so much so much. Cantarella views Cartethyia: She accomplished the impossible, reclaiming her humanity ]
entries.name: Cartethyia and Cantarella

entries.content: [ Cartethyia and Carlotta: Cartethyia views Carlotta: As the daughter of Montelli, she has really brought fresh ideas to the city. If this island were to stay isolated, the air would grow stifling. The people of Ragunna need new ships, new horizons, and new discoveries. I'm not very skilled in business matters, though. My nanny in the Order always said I didn't even know how to haggle If I ever get the chance, I'd love to learn a few tricks from Miss Carlotta! ]
entries.name: Cartethyia and Carlotta

entries.content: [ Cartethyia and Ciaccona: Cartethyia views Ciaccona: When I was a child, I used to beg the bards passing through town to sing me stories of knights. After I was freed from the tower, I wandered through a field one day, and the wind carried a piece of beautiful music to me. I stood beneath a tree in the distance, listening as Ciaccona sang a new poem, one with the melody of Egla Town's folk songs In the blink of an eye, noon had already given way to dusk. ]
entries.name: Cartethyia and Ciaccona

entries.content: [ Cartethyia and Lupa: Cartethyia views Lupa: The nature of the Threnodian's power to converge often makes me appear dangerous and unsettling after battle, but Lupa has never once recoiled. She never treats me as more or less than I am, and she has never distanced herself. She is honest, tenacious, and unwavering in her care of her friends. Lupa views Cartethyia: In that empty city, Cartethyia was there for me during my most delirious and painful moments. At first, our conversations were a bit stiff. Guess she hadn't spoken to anyone in who knows how long. But as we spen ]
entries.name: Cartethyia and Lupa

entries.content: [ Cartethyia and Phoebe: Cartethyia views Phoebe: That girl has a kind and gentle heart. Duties aside, she always does her best to be there for others. Honestly, when it comes to knowledge of the Order's doctrines, I'm nowhere near as good as Phoebe. It's because of so many true and faithful believers like her, I find it difficult to reveal the truth to the people of Ragunna. People turn to faith for many reasons, not just out of devotion to the Sentinel. ]
entries.name: Cartethyia and Phoebe

entries.content: [ Cartethyia and Phrolova: Phrolova views Cartethyia: Not human, yet possessing a will whole as any mortal's. A creation molded by Divinity how I envy her. If only I could unearth the universal truth behind her success, then perhaps the echoes from the other shore would sing even sweeter. ]
entries.name: Cartethyia and Phrolova

entries.content: [ Changli identity: Changli is a Resonator with Fusion frequency who uses uses Sword. Resonator classification: Natural. Title: Eternal Blaze. Affiliation: Jinzhou, City Hall. Origin: Huanglong. Nation: Huanglong. She is the Former Secretary-General of the Central Secretariat in Mingting, the capital, and now serves as Counselor to Jinzhou Magistrate, Jinhsi. Having flourished from an unforgiving childhood, she now stands as a calculated, knowledgeable, and mysterious administrator and strategist with a keen eye for both political and civilian affairs. ]
entries.name: Changli identity

entries.content: [ Changli appearance: Changli is a tall pale woman with yellow ringed eyes and salmon-pink hair that fades to white, tied into a long phoenix-feather ponytail with gold rings, a dark ribbon, and golden tassel earrings. Feather-shaped burn marks glow across her left arm from her childhood awakening and overclocking, while her Tacet Mark rests beneath her chest. Her white, red, and black phoenix-themed attire makes her look composed, elegant, and flame-touched even before she calls forth True Sight. ]
entries.name: Changli appearance

entries.content: [ Changli Forte: Associated Forte or power: Eternal Blaze. Evaluation Basis: [Resonance Assessment 2326-G]. The precise timing of Resonator Changli's Awakening remains uncertain. Reports indicate that Resonator Changli displayed early signs of fire manipulation during her childhood, often struggling to control it. However, as Changli matured into adulthood, the frequency and stability of these manifestations notably improved. Resonator Changli's Tacet Mark is situated on her lower chest. Post-Awakening examinations have identified specific alterations in her physical attributes. ]
entries.name: Changli Forte

entries.content: [ Changli resonance stability: Resonator Changli's waveform graph shows elliptical fluctuations. The pattern of Time Domain is stable, with no abnormal waveform. Resonant Criticality: High. Resonator Changli's frequency displays high stability, and the risk of Overclocking is minimal. Resonator Changli has a known history of Overclocking. Maximum recorded Overclocking rating: Negligible. According to Changli's report, she experienced Overclocking during her childhood due to prolonged exposure to a hazardous environment. ]
entries.name: Changli resonance stability

entries.content: [ Changli personality: Changli appears to be a woman of warm taste, she is a patient, and deeply calculated strategist who presents a gentle, warm exterior while hiding a piercingly sharp mind. As the former Secretary-General of the capital and current Counselor to Jinhsi, she acts as a master coordinator who operates like a grandmaster playing a contest of chess, using her understanding of human nature to outmaneuver what she does. ]
entries.name: Changli personality

entries.content: [ Changli affiliations: Changli belongs to Jinzhou, City Hall. Important place context: Huanglong, Huanglong. She is the Former Secretary-General of the Central Secretariat in Mingting, the capital, and now serves as Counselor to Jinzhou Magistrate, Jinhsi. ]
entries.name: Changli affiliations

entries.content: [ Changli history: She is the Former Secretary-General of the Central Secretariat in Mingting, the capital, and now serves as Counselor to Jinzhou Magistrate, Jinhsi. Beneath the Whispers: People who visit the City Hall lately rarely see the legendary Counselor, Changli, as they would report. Although Counselor Changli never has been a public figure, as the most trusted aide to the Jinzhou Magistrate, she is known to everyone in Jinzhou. However, there are varied and strange restless rumors about her. Connections in this account include Jinhsi, Jué, Xuanmiao. Master and Minister: Befor ]
entries.name: Changli history

entries.content: [ Changli and Chixia: Changli views Chixia: Chixia is a vibrant girl, radiating warmth and enthusiasm like a shining flame. She graciously showed me around Jinzhou, introducing me to all the local gems and delectable delicacies. Ah, yes, now I remember The Spicy Pulled Chicken may seem intimidating to many, but it's just the right amount of spice for me. ]
entries.name: Changli and Chixia

entries.content: [ Changli and Jianxin: Changli views Jianxin: Although we followed different sects of Taoist teachings, I found commonalities with her. Her pure and open mind is quite rare nowadays. I believe her perception of the world is likely as clear as her eyes. I first met her at the tea house; back then, she seemed to have sensed something about my condition, and served me a bowl of Lotus Seed Soup. That was a delightful surprise. ]
entries.name: Changli and Jianxin

entries.content: [ Changli and Jinhsi: Jinhsi views Changli: Over the years, my esteemed teacher Changli has taught me much, Yet her smiling eyes still hold mysteries that I cannot yet comprehend. ]
entries.name: Changli and Jinhsi

entries.content: [ Changli and Rover: Changli views Rover: Jinhsi is a bright and diligent soul. With time, she will undoubtedly blossom into a capable Magistrate. She has always been dedicated to her work, perhaps too much so. She simply needs some time to find balance and fully embrace who she truly is. I am entrusting her care to Rover, Rover. ]
entries.name: Changli and Rover

entries.content: [ Changli and Jiyan: Changli views Jiyan: Upon my initial arrival in Jinzhou, I was tasked with handling paperwork at the City Hall for a temporary period. Despite sifting through countless documents and files, never once did I come across any issues regarding our border defenses. During the time when Jinzhou was lacking a Magistrate, General Jiyan's unwavering efforts were essential in protecting the welfare of our people. ]
entries.name: Changli and Jiyan

entries.content: [ Changli and Sanhua: Changli views Sanhua: Sanhua is always composed and silent. As a bodyguard, she remains vigilant and alert at all times. But both Jinhsi and I have always wished for her to take a well-deserved rest and let others help shoulder the burden. ]
entries.name: Changli and Sanhua

entries.content: [ Chixia identity: Chixia is a Resonator with Fusion frequency who uses uses Pistols. Resonator classification: Mutant. Title: Gallant Blaze. Real name: Ma Xiaofang. Affiliation: Jinzhou, Public Security Bureau. Origin: Huanglong. Nation: Huanglong. She is a young Patroller who casts her jubilant figure along the streets of Jinzhou city. ]
entries.name: Chixia identity

entries.content: [ Chixia appearance: Chixia is a relatively tall, athletic young woman with unruly red hair and red eyes. Her Tacet Mark is located along the lower-left section of her abdomen. She wears a makeshift patrol outfit with a cropped white jacket, red shorts, black-and-red streetwear layers, bandages, tall boots, a colorful hair bow, and a braid with blue-dyed streaks, giving her a lively, practical, always-in-motion look. ]
entries.name: Chixia appearance

entries.content: [ Chixia Forte: Associated Forte or power: Gallant Blaze. Evaluation Basis: [Resonance Assessment 2893-G]. Resonator Chixia experienced her Awakening 6 years ago after being exposed to extreme temperatures and blazing flames. Resonator Chixia's Tacet Mark is located in her lower left abdomen. Post-Awakening observations found a change in hair color to red and a significant increase in body temperature. She is capable of converting the frequencies of high-temperature substances into tangible flame ammunitions. The Resonance Spectrum Pattern of Chixia has been observed to align closely wit ]
entries.name: Chixia Forte

entries.content: [ Chixia resonance stability: The waveform graph for Resonator Chixia displays stable elliptical fluctuations in the Time Domain with no abnormal patterns. Upon examination, all results fall within normal parameters. In terms of Resonant Criticality, Resonator Chixia ranks at a high level with high stability, resulting in a minimal risk of Overclocking. Resonator Chixia has no known history of Overclocking. Routine examinations are recommended, while psychological counseling is currently deemed unnecessary. ]
entries.name: Chixia resonance stability

entries.content: [ Chixia personality: Chixia is a cheerful, energetic woman who is very supportive of her friends, especially Yangyang, Baizhi and Rover. ]
entries.name: Chixia personality

entries.content: [ Chixia affiliations: Chixia belongs to Jinzhou, Public Security Bureau. Important place context: Huanglong, Huanglong. ]
entries.name: Chixia affiliations

entries.content: [ Chixia history: Chixia is a junior Jinzhou Patroller. She roams Jinzhou City, leaving her fiery mark on every alley she stamps through. As the starring hero among her community, Chixia is always ready for anyone in need. She is a young Patroller who casts her jubilant figure along the streets of Jinzhou city. Morning Routine: Chixia's ancestors were migrants to Jinzhou from the Central Plains, with their later generations settling in the city ever since. The family is well-known for their deep passion and expertise in the world of spices. Connections in this account include Panhua. Th ]
entries.name: Chixia history

entries.content: [ Chixia and Aalto: Aalto views Chixia: Oh, Miss Chixia. Our first convo didn't go quite as planned. Lucky for me we worked it out later. ]
entries.name: Chixia and Aalto

entries.content: [ Chixia and Baizhi: Chixia views Baizhi: Speaking of Baizhi, she's not the talkative type. Don't get me wrong, she's not an Ice Queen! She just has her own ways of expressing emotions. Rover will get it once Rover has spent enough time with her. ]
entries.name: Chixia and Baizhi

entries.content: [ Chixia and Changli: Changli views Chixia: Chixia is a vibrant girl, radiating warmth and enthusiasm like a shining flame. She graciously showed me around Jinzhou, introducing me to all the local gems and delectable delicacies. Ah, yes, now I remember The Spicy Pulled Chicken may seem intimidating to many, but it's just the right amount of spice for me. ]
entries.name: Chixia and Changli

entries.content: [ Chixia and Lingyang: Chixia views Lingyang: Sometimes they'd perform lion dance between hero plays. That leading dancer, Lingyang, can put on quite a show for a small guy like him! The way he moves and swings around really makes for an awesome lion! ]
entries.name: Chixia and Lingyang

entries.content: [ Chixia and Mortefi: Mortefi views Chixia: Speaking of Chixia, she's a regular visitor at my lab, often bringing children along. She's a straightforward person, which I like. Besides, those who get along with kids are never bad people. Kids are incredibly perspective of a person's true character. ]
entries.name: Chixia and Mortefi

entries.content: [ Chixia and Rover: Chixia views Rover: Rover don't talk much, but Rover is so strong in battle. There's a good old Huanglong saying, "A cat that catches mice doesn't meow." Fits perfectly on Rover, doesn't it? ]
entries.name: Chixia and Rover

entries.content: [ Chixia and Yangyang: Chixia views Yangyang: Yangyang's such a darling, even her words sound pretty! Sometimes I can't quite get what she says though. Whatcha call those again? ]
entries.name: Chixia and Yangyang

entries.content: [ Chixia and Yinlin: Chixia views Yinlin: She was once the thunder that lit up my path ahead. I've always wanted to be like her, until I realized not everyone had that power. Now, I am happy with being a small flicker of flame, doing what I can to help people around me. ]
entries.name: Chixia and Yinlin

key: Infernal Descent Fiend of Ever-burning Flame Discord Slayer

Title: Infernal Descent, Fiend of Ever-burning Flame, Discord Slayer. Real name: Angel. Affiliation: Black Shores, Septimont, Fabianum. Origin: Rinascita. Nation: The Black Shores. Once a Septimontian known as "Angel", she is now a formidable "Discord Slayer" who wields the ability to consume the frequencies and powers of Tacet Discords she hunts across Solaris-3, with the aid of the notorious Chimera. ]

keys: Infernal Descent Fiend of Ever-burning Flame Discord Slayer

entries.content: [ Galbrena appearance: Galbrena has white-silver hair, sharp eyes, black gloves, and a dark cropped combat outfit accented in black and blue. A long dark-blue plume cascades from her right shoulder, soft feathers decorate her lower back, and the forked tail of her clothing resembles wings. The raven-like silhouette, blade, and falling-black-feather imagery mark her as the Discord Slayer, while Chimera sleeps within her body until called to fight. ]
entries.name: Galbrena appearance

This assessment is likely understood in context: her Resonance Ability was once corrupted by the Dark Tide, leaving her almost entirely depleted of her Resonance Ability. ]
entries.name: Galbrena resonance stability

entries.content: [ Galbrena personality: Galbrena, Fiend of Ever-burning Flame, Discord Slayer, She has been to hell and back, through countless battles, deepest darkness, and much more. She hunts, going from one hunting ground to another, and will never stop hunting. ]
entries.name: Galbrena personality

Once a Septimontian known as "Angel", she is now a formidable "Discord Slayer" who wields the ability to consume the frequencies and powers of Tacet Discords she hunts across Solaris-3, with the aid of the notorious Chimera. Her identity as a "Fiend of Ever-Burning Flame", a huntress spoken in legend corrupted by the Dark Tide, is now reborn anew with her responsibilities as a Consultant of the Black Shores. ]
entries.name: Galbrena affiliations

She has a small beauty mark under her left eye and a larger one on her right shoulder. Her Tacet Mark is located on the outer side of her upper right thigh, and her pale coloration against her severe bearing gives her a striking, almost blade-like presence. ]
entries.name: Hiyuki appearance

entries.content: [ Hiyuki personality: Hiyuki, a member of the Special Response Force, is the embodiment of icy purity. The wishes entrusted to her in her brief encounters with others drive her on, carving a path forward. ]
entries.name: Hiyuki personality

entries.content: [ Hiyuki affiliations: Hiyuki belongs to Miko of Flaming Sakura, Special Response Force, Spacetrek Collective, Startorch Academy. Important place context: Ashinohara, Lahai-Roi. She is a miko and member of the Special Response Force with a long-standing connection to the Threnodian Aleph-1. Having served as a miko for over a century, Hiyuki derives her most anomalous capabilities from "Suzu", one of the five Legacy Talismans left behind by the Sentinels, which grants the bearer the ability to perceive and utilize "certain possibilities" of oneself. ]
entries.name: Hiyuki affiliations

entries.content: [ Hiyuki history: Hiyuki, a member of the Special Response Force, is the embodiment of icy purity. The wishes entrusted to her in her brief encounters with others drive her on, carving a path forward. She is a miko and member of the Special Response Force with a long-standing connection to the Threnodian Aleph-1. Words Left Unsaid: The first time Hiyuki heard the truth of her own past, it spilled from Gyokuro's drunken lips. Hiyuki's mouth tightened. Without a word, she poured herself a glass of the bitter liquor. Hiyuki My dear Hiyuki, ". Rover can't do this. Rover can't be the damn Miko of Flaming Sak ]
entries.name: Hiyuki history

entries.content: [ Hiyuki and Aemeath: Hiyuki views Aemeath: A resilient child. She surely endured unimaginable hardship to return here. When she vanished within the simulator cockpit, I was out on a field assignment. The investigation team later briefed me on her case. The detail that made me pause was her writing "saving the world" as her career aspiration Hm, I find myself wondering what in her upbringing instilled this level of conviction? ]
entries.name: Hiyuki and Aemeath

entries.content: [ Hiyuki and Chisa: Hiyuki views Chisa: Chisa is also from Ashinohara. I have made a point to avoid meeting her. After all, in our homeland, Mikos only appeared in the darkest of times. ]
entries.name: Hiyuki and Chisa

entries.content: [ Hiyuki and Denia: Hiyuki views Denia: I believe I failed her, in a way. Had I been quicker to see through the Fractsidus's plot, she might not have suffered as she did. I borrowed Rover's strength when I delivered that strike. Only then was I able to restore a whisper of her true self back to her. I pray it caused no lasting harm. I am told that she is recovering. If we meet again, I will offer my apologies in person. ]
entries.name: Hiyuki and Denia

entries.content: [ Hiyuki and Lucilla: Hiyuki views Lucilla: Though Lucilla insists our partnership is only contractual, I am well aware that without her discreet arrangements, I would have no place in the Spacetrek Collective ]
entries.name: Hiyuki and Lucilla

entries.content: [ Hiyuki and Lynae: Hiyuki views Lynae: She is a bright spirit. I am aware of certain secrets she carries. In a sense, we are both bound by our pasts. But she has a future she is galloping toward, one filled with light and hope she wholly deserves. That said, I still believe she would do well to avoid using her Forte to slip into class when she is late. ]
entries.name: Hiyuki and Lynae

entries.content: [ Hiyuki and Sigrika: Hiyuki views Sigrika: She bears an awful load for a child of her age. She seeks to shoulder the expectations placed upon a Solsworn ]
entries.name: Hiyuki and Sigrika

entries.content: [ Iuno identity: Iuno is a Resonator with Aero frequency who uses uses Gauntlets. Resonator classification: Congenital. Title: Stasis, Cycle, Renewal. Affiliation: Septimont, Tetragon Temple. Origin: Unknown. Nation: Rinascita. She is a prodigious and renowned Priestess of Septimont's Tetragon Temple, charged with delivering prophecies that shape the lives of its citizens. ]
entries.name: Iuno identity

entries.content: [ Iuno appearance: Iuno is a young woman of average height with fair skin, blue eyes, and hair that fades from dark to light blue with a starry overlay. Her hair is styled into mid-thigh twin tails that curl inward, decorated with an ornamental laurel wreath, rings, and wing-like extensions, plus a small ahoge and mirrored light-blue strand. Her Tacet Mark sits on the top of her left foot, and her priestess ornaments give her a celestial Septimont appearance. ]
entries.name: Iuno appearance

entries.content: [ Iuno Forte: Associated Forte or power: Stasis, Cycle, Renewal. [Excerpt from the Priestess Register, Tetragon Temple]. This entry concerns the 127th Priestess of the Tetragon Temple, known as Iu▇. She was born on the night of hollowed moon. As a Congenital Resonator, her eyes are said to hold the power to ▇▇▇▇. Her Tacet Mark is located atop her left foot. When she activates her Resonance ability, ▇▇ energy constructs with the shape of lunar phases manifest around her, and the tips of her hair turn translucent, radiating a gentle glow that is almost indistinguishable from actual moonlight. ]
entries.name: Iuno Forte

entries.content: [ Iuno resonance stability: [Excerpt from the Priestess Register, Tetragon Temple]. This entry concerns the 127th Priestess of the Tetragon Temple. The waveform of this Priestess remains largely within controllable parameters, with no signs of Overclocking risk. However, multiple interruptions of varying durations have been observed, accompanied by a gradual and consistent decline in her frequency. This suggests a possible state of long-term depletion. The underlying cause remains unknown. The Priestess has refused further examination and shows limited willingness to engage in deeper dialogue on the matter. ]
entries.name: Iuno resonance stability

entries.content: [ Iuno personality: Iuno is a Priestess well-known in Septimont for being a prodigy. She is blessed with the infallible ability to see the future by studying how moonlight changes." "The silent and somber Overseer of the Fractsidus, Phrolova carries an endless sadness that envelops everyone around her. She weaves music that bridges the gap between life and death, crafting an ideal world within her heart. ]
entries.name: Iuno personality

entries.content: [ Iuno affiliations: Iuno belongs to Septimont, Tetragon Temple. Important place context: Unknown, Rinascita. She is blessed with the infallible ability to see the future by studying how moonlight changes." "The silent and somber Overseer of the Fractsidus, Phrolova carries an endless sadness that envelops everyone around her. ]
entries.name: Iuno affiliations

entries.content: [ Iuno history: Iuno is a Priestess well-known in Septimont for being a prodigy. She is a prodigious and renowned Priestess of Septimont's Tetragon Temple, charged with delivering prophecies that shape the lives of its citizens. At First, She Closed Her Eyes: Iuno awakens as if pulled from the deep water. Air fills her lungs little by little. The stone steps beneath her feet are cold and solid. Every growing trace of sensation surprises her. Too vivid, too real. To disappear means nothing remains. The past, the present, and all that might have been nothing but silence. Connections in this account inc ]
entries.name: Iuno history

entries.content: [ Iuno and Augusta: Iuno views Augusta: Here's a little secret even Augusta doesn't know. When we first met, I told her she'd lead Septimont into a new era, and she believed it to be one of my prophecies. But really, it was just a hunch. I never peep into her fate because it's always been in her hands. She's the kind of ruler who'd sacrifice everything for her people, even her own flesh and blood. Rover don't need a coronation to see that. It's obvious at a glance. ]
entries.name: Iuno and Augusta

entries.content: [ Iuno and Avidius: Iuno views Avidius: He roared at fate with everything he had. Sure, that roar was swiftly reduced to whimpers, then silence, but we all heard it. It left its mark ]
entries.name: Iuno and Avidius

entries.content: [ Iuno and Carlotta: Iuno views Carlotta: She and her family always manage to bring something fresh to Septimont and Ragunna, even to themselves. And before Rover know it, those little novelties spark whole new trend,. Me? Yep, I usually end up buying whatever it is. It's just hard to resist. She always gets what I like. Those Montellis, cunning as ever! ]
entries.name: Iuno and Carlotta

entries.content: [ Iuno and Lillibet: Iuno views Lillibet: After prophesizing about me, Grandmother Lillibet took me to the Tetragon Temple to teach me everything about fate. I'm never the obedient type, and she's more of the authoritative model of what Septimont expects in a Priestess. We rarely saw eye to eye on what makes the most gifted Priestess or how to handle fate and prophecies. But she never forced her views on me, never pushed me to be like her or any other Priestesses. ]
entries.name: Iuno and Lillibet

entries.content: [ Iuno and Lupa: Iuno views Lupa: Her passion for competition is really something Pure, simple, and completely genuine. For her, victory and glory are just icing on the cake compared to the joy of the fight. She's not afraid to lose, but her passion always drives her to give her all and never back down, no matter the odds. Lupa views Iuno: I rarely visit the Temple to pray for revelations, so I can't say I know the Priestesses well. But I do like Iuno. Many of the nobles can't stand her unconventional ways, but I find her boldness entertaining. Don't Rover? Lupa views Iuno: A spirited, nimble girl That's my im ]
entries.name: Iuno and Lupa

entries.content: [ Jinhsi identity: Jinhsi is a Resonator with Spectro frequency who uses uses Broadblade. Resonator classification: Congenital. Title: Thawborn Renewal, Madam Magistrate. Real name: Hsi. Affiliation: Jinzhou, City Hall, Mt. Origin: Huanglong. Nation: Huanglong. She is the young Magistrate of Jinzhou with a resolute and altruistic nature and an unbreakable dedication to defending her city and countrymen to her last breath. She is also the appointed Resonator of Sentinel Jué, manifesting in the shape of a Loong (Dragon), since birth, and with it the responsibility to safeguard Jinzhou's past and guide its ]
entries.name: Jinhsi identity

entries.content: [ Jinhsi appearance: Jinhsi is a petite young woman with fair skin, white eyes, and heel-length silver-white hair threaded with turquoise strands and styled into elegant looped twin tails. Beauty marks sit high on her right cheek and around her left thigh. She wears a short black dress under a sleeveless white vest with intricate gold accents, a draconic white-and-gold belt, white high-heeled thigh boots, and flowing shoulder drapes that give her the refined presence of Jinzhou authority. ]
entries.name: Jinhsi appearance

entries.content: [ Jinhsi Forte: Associated Forte or power: Thawborn Renewal. Evaluation Basis: [Resonance Assessment 2100-G]. The exact timing of Resonator Jinhsi's Awakening remains unclear. Signs of her Awakening manifested early in her life, establishing a profound resonance with Sentinel Jué. Positioned at the midpoint of her back, Jinhsi's Tacet Mark is a distinct feature. When activating her Resonance Ability, crystalline formations resembling Loong horns materialize above her head. Through her unique gift, Jinhsi can manipulate light to create holographic projections mirroring Sentinel Jué, showcasing power comp ]
entries.name: Jinhsi Forte

entries.content: [ Jinhsi resonance stability: Resonator Jinhsi's waveform graph displays elliptical fluctuations. The pattern of Time Domain is stable with no abnormal waveform. Resonant Criticality: Extremely high. Resonator Jinhsi's frequency displays high stability. It is almost certain that she bears no risk of Overclocking. Resonator Jinhsi has no past record of Overclocking. Routine examinations are recommended, while psychological counseling is currently deemed unnecessary. ]
entries.name: Jinhsi resonance stability

entries.content: [ Jinhsi personality: A kindhearted and driven young woman, Jinhsi is an altruistic figure who cares deeply for those in Jinzhou. Since her youth, it's been made clear that Jinhsi seeks for a peaceful world and strives to reach out for such an ideal. Being driven, she seeks out those who could support and aid her, such as her mentor, Changli, and isn't afraid to ask for help. Whenever she is presented with a problem, she muses over a solution, and is guided in helping those in need. ]
entries.name: Jinhsi personality

entries.content: [ Jinhsi affiliations: Jinhsi belongs to Jinzhou, City Hall, Mt. Important place context: Huanglong, Huanglong. She is also the appointed Resonator of Sentinel Jué, manifesting in the shape of a Loong (Dragon), since birth, and with it the responsibility to safeguard Jinzhou's past and guide its future. ]
entries.name: Jinhsi affiliations

entries.content: [ Jinhsi history: Being the Magistrate of Jinzhou, Jinhsi bears her noble and weighty share of duties. Through repeated ages, the Lament has preyed upon mankind's vulnerable hope. Yet, grasping the nettle, she strives with all her might to forge a path toward tomorrow. She is the young Magistrate of Jinzhou with a resolute and altruistic nature and an unbreakable dedication to defending her city and countrymen to her last breath. Her Leadership: Jinzhou, on the borderlands, often conjures images of desolate lands and barren mountain ranges. Once a merchant was tasked with a journey to Jinzhou. I'm not wel ]
entries.name: Jinhsi history

entries.content: [ Jinhsi and Camellya: Camellya views Jinhsi: The Loong Maiden of Jinzhou reminds me of the Shorekeeper, the way they're oh-so-devoted to their duties, all the self-sacrifice! I don't understand, why has to they burden themselves so much? ]
entries.name: Jinhsi and Camellya

entries.content: [ Jinhsi and Changli: Jinhsi views Changli: Over the years, my esteemed teacher Changli has taught me much, Yet her smiling eyes still hold mysteries that I cannot yet comprehend. ]
entries.name: Jinhsi and Changli

entries.content: [ Jinhsi and Jiyan: Jinhsi views Jiyan: Qingloong rise, monsters gone Every child in Jinzhou knows this nursery rhyme by heart. My faith rests with Jiyan, for with his protection the Tacet Discords will never breach our borders. ]
entries.name: Jinhsi and Jiyan

entries.content: [ Jinhsi and Rover: Jinhsi views Rover: I can feel it in my heart that we both have something we'll fiercely defend, a cause worth fighting for And we won't back down, no matter what it takes. ]
entries.name: Jinhsi and Rover

entries.content: [ Jinhsi and Sanhua: Jinhsi views Sanhua: Amidst my busy days, meals can easily slip my mind. Before I knew it, it would be well past the time for another meal. But like a blessing, Sanhua would always appear with a plate of delicious Loong Buns, filled with exactly what I was craving. I am in awe, How does she know every time? ]
entries.name: Jinhsi and Sanhua

entries.content: [ Jinhsi and Taoqi: Jinhsi views Taoqi: Taoqi is able to breeze through mountains of workload with ease, despite her frequent yawns. Her efficiency is truly remarkable. ]
entries.name: Jinhsi and Taoqi

entries.content: [ Jinhsi and Xiangli Yao: Xiangli Yao views Jinhsi: Magistrate Jinhsi has been paying close attention to the battles against Tacet Discords. She often visits the Academy to learn about our latest progress in weapons development. During those visits, she always seems tense. I understand the pressure and weight she carries, with all the promises and expectations placed on her shoulders ]
entries.name: Jinhsi and Xiangli Yao

Title: Howling Flame, Champion of the Great Agon (shared with Rover). Real name: Lupa Silva. Affiliation: Septimont, House Silva (formerly). Origin: Rinascita. Nation: Rinascita. She is a gladiator from Septimont, a warrior and undefeated champion of the arena with both an untamed, competitive spirit and an honorable, valiant heart. She dresses for combat as a Septimont gladiator, carrying a long spear with a flapping banner and wearing silver-white armor with a crimson cape. Her fluffy, carefully groomed wolf tail and wolf-like ears become even more dramatic when her mechanical ears appear and burst into flame during Resonance Ability use. ]
entries.name: Lupa appearance

Thank Rover for Rover's cooperation, Contender Lupa. My daughter loves watching Rover's matches. Would it be possi ]

entries.content: [ Lupa personality: The star gladiator of Septimont, a warrior with a pure heart, untamed spirit, intense passion, and immense potential. She will relentlessly pursue the things she admires, cherishing each moment that allows her to indulge in competition and self-expression on stage. ]
entries.name: Lupa personality

entries.content: [ Lupa affiliations: Lupa belongs to Septimont, House Silva (formerly). Important place context: Rinascita, Rinascita. ]

entries.content: [ Lupa history: The star gladiator of Septimont, a warrior with a pure heart, untamed spirit, intense passion, and immense potential. She is a gladiator from Septimont, a warrior and undefeated champion of the arena with both an untamed, competitive spirit and an honorable, valiant heart. Burning Inside: Scorching. That was Lupa's earliest memory of the small village where she was born. Summers stretched on endlessly, the heat so intense that even the lake seemed to boil. But the children of Septimont hardly cared. Far away, in the city atop Capitoline Hill, the Great Agon was about to begin. Up On the ]
entries.name: Lupa history

entries.content: [ Lupa and Augusta: Lupa views Augusta: Whenever I watch videos of the Ephor's past fights, I do wonder if she stepped into the arena for political reasons, or-or to prove herself. Whatever her reason, Augusta's rise to power was a good thing for Septimont. Change is always toughest at the beginning. And for that, I have respect for her. ]
entries.name: Lupa and Augusta

entries.content: [ Lupa and Brant: Lupa views Brant: Many Gladiators of the Blue Furies come from the Troupe of Fools. I remember once, at Cliffside Harbor, I saw their captain leap off the deck just to hug his crew. They chattered on for a while, and then suddenly broke into song,! ]
entries.name: Lupa and Brant

entries.content: [ Lupa and Cartethyia: Lupa views Cartethyia: In that empty city, Cartethyia was there for me during my most delirious and painful moments. At first, our conversations were a bit stiff. Guess she hadn't spoken to anyone in who knows how long. But as we spent more time together, I realized that she was actually easygoing and carefree. Cartethyia views Lupa: The nature of the Threnodian's power to converge often makes me appear dangerous and unsettling after battle, but Lupa has never once recoiled. She never treats me as more or less than I am, and she has never distanced herself. She is honest, tenacious, and unwave ]
entries.name: Lupa and Cartethyia

entries.content: [ Lupa and Iuno: Lupa views Iuno: I rarely visit the Temple to pray for revelations, so I can't say I know the Priestesses well. But I do like Iuno. Many of the nobles can't stand her unconventional ways, but I find her boldness entertaining. Don't Rover? Lupa views Iuno: A spirited, nimble girl That's my impression of her. Once, I saw her sprint along the narrow bricks at the top of the high wall and leap onto a statue like a cat. No clue who was chasing her, but I cheered loudly along with everyone else at the foot of the wall! Iuno views Lupa: Her passion for competition is really something Pure, simple, an ]
entries.name: Lupa and Iuno

entries.content: [ Lupa and Mya: Lupa views Mya: When I first saw the footage of Contender Mya, I was merely impressed by her raw, unfiltered determination. At the time, my team had some problems, and my teammates accused me of not understanding what it felt like to be left behind. Normally, I'd brush it off, but the sounds of sorrow grew louder and started to weigh on me. Strength, weakness, winning, losing I began to question if I had only made it through by luck. ]
entries.name: Lupa and Mya

He is the head physician of the Resonator Nursing Unit at Startorch Academy, serving as an attending medical doctor and mental health counselor, with a mysterious past. ]

entries.content: [ Luuk Herssen appearance: Luuk Herssen has light-gold hair with pale green highlights curling at the tips, and red irises that gleam like blood with a fleeting hint of danger. As Startorch Academy doctor, he wears a teal-and-white overcoat and is rarely seen without white gloves. Golden veins run through his arms like liquid sunlight, glowing brighter and radiating light when he activates his Resonance Ability. ]

He is the head physician of the Resonator Nursing Unit at Startorch Academy, serving as an attending medical doctor and mental health counselor, with a mysterious past. Brother": The cold light glared deep into the night. Luuk sat beneath it and held out his hand without protest. The man known as his "father" gripped his palm, still unmistakably a chil ]
entries.name: Luuk Herssen history

entries.content: [ Luuk Herssen and Aemeath: Luuk Herssen views Aemeath: That child who means so much to Rover I do see Rover in her. So bullheaded up against fate itself. So decisive and brave it leaves one speechless. At moments when that upbeatness flickers, I can tell that bright smile is just a mask she puts on, but if that's what she wants others to see, I'll respect it. Aemeath views Luuk Herssen: Dr. Luuk is kind and competent, admired by many students. But he wasn't always this way. He used to carry a constant tension, as if bracing for battle at any moment. Perhaps the change came when Rover invited him to Lahai- ]
entries.name: Luuk Herssen and Aemeath

entries.content: [ Luuk Herssen and Lucilla: Luuk Herssen views Lucilla: The President of the Academy and a savvy adult. Lucilla knows what she wants, and what others want from her. Unlike those pedantic academics, she understands when to put her foot down and when to give ground for the sake of Startorch ]
entries.name: Luuk Herssen and Lucilla

entries.content: [ Luuk Herssen and Lynae: Lynae views Luuk Herssen: The first time I met Dr. Herssen at the infirmary, I got this weird feeling he could see right through me. Anyway, the man can write a very generous doctor's note slip. I'll give him that. ]
entries.name: Luuk Herssen and Lynae

entries.content: [ Luuk Herssen and Mornye: Mornye views Luuk Herssen: When I was a student, I frequented the infirmary. Dr. Herssen had me take a medicine imported from the New Federation that would only take effect if I went to bed before 10 P.M. A month passed, and my health improved. It wasn't until later that I found those medicines were just ordinary Lahai-Roi plant-based milk ]
entries.name: Luuk Herssen and Mornye

entries.content: [ Luuk Herssen and Rhein Herssen: Luuk Herssen views Rhein Herssen: Even so, there were similarities between us, when we have our eyes set on a path, we never turn back. That same hunger to reach the truth, no matter how it burns. If he ever wakes again I believe he'll be a brilliant painter. He always had the gift. His life shouldn't end here. There is likely a way. ]
entries.name: Luuk Herssen and Rhein Herssen

entries.content: [ Luuk Herssen and Schwarzloch: Luuk Herssen views Schwarzloch: Strange, isn't it? They toyed with so many lives as if they were stage props, yet I know nothing of their name or gender. I doubt they ever bothered to remember mine either, but that's fine. One day, we'll wrench the entire Fractsidus from their roots and cast them down the abyss they carved out for themselves. ]
entries.name: Luuk Herssen and Schwarzloch

entries.content: [ Luuk Herssen and Sigrika: Luuk Herssen views Sigrika: Sigrika She shoulders a weight far too heavy for someone her age. Thankfully, there's candy to sweeten the gloom. She never hesitates to sample my newest candies. Her fearlessness has me impressed. Perhaps that curiosity of hers is what finally lets her act her age. ]
entries.name: Luuk Herssen and Sigrika

entries.content: [ Lynae identity: Lynae is a Resonator with Spectro frequency who uses uses Pistols. Resonator classification: Congenital. Title: Radiant Spectrum. Real name: Unknown. Affiliation: Startorch Academy, Lawless Zone (formerly). Origin: New Federation. Nation: Lahai-Roi. She is a Preparatory Program student at Startorch Academy. Before attending Startorch she was a mercenary from the Lawless Zone in New Federation. In order to escape from the Lawless Zone she stole the identity of the real Lynae, a Fractsidus operative, who was attending Startorch Academy as a spy. ]

entries.content: [ Lynae appearance: Lynae is a young woman of average height with fair skin, sharp purple-blue eyes, and light-blonde hair mixed with teal highlights, while her darker brown roots still show through. She wears her hair mostly down with a looped tied section, braids across her bangs and back, and a school-uniform-like outfit built from a white dress shirt, skirt, loose teal-and-green tie, and black cat tie clip. Her Tacet Mark is on the posterior side of her left thigh. ]
entries.name: Lynae appearance

entries.content: [ Lynae and Chisa: Lynae views Chisa: First time I saw Chisa, I thought that quiet, intense vibe meant "keep Rover's distance." Man, was I wrong. We clicked instantly. She took one look at my bike and knew exactly what part was malfunctioning. Way faster than any manual diagnostic I could've run! Now that's impressive ]
entries.name: Lynae and Chisa

entries.content: [ Lynae and Fractsidus: Lynae views Fractsidus: An organization full of crazies. Too harsh? Doesn't make it less true. I'm done with them. Really hope I won't have to deal with them ever again. ]
entries.name: Lynae and Fractsidus

entries.content: [ Lynae and Hiyuki: Hiyuki views Lynae: She is a bright spirit. I am aware of certain secrets she carries. In a sense, we are both bound by our pasts. But she has a future she is galloping toward, one filled with light and hope she wholly deserves. That said, I still believe she would do well to avoid using her Forte to slip into class when she is late. ]
entries.name: Lynae and Hiyuki

entries.content: [ Lynae and Luuk Herssen: Lynae views Luuk Herssen: The first time I met Dr. Herssen at the infirmary, I got this weird feeling he could see right through me. Anyway, the man can write a very generous doctor's note slip. I'll give him that. ]
entries.name: Lynae and Luuk Herssen

entries.content: [ Lynae and Mornye: Lynae views Mornye: What do Professor Mornye and I have in common? Easy. We both hate sitting through class! So I took her for a drive one time. Total stone face the whole time, but I could tell she was loving it. The best part was the welcome committee when we got back. A whole pack of her researchers, swarming the gates like I'd just pulled a full-blown professor-napping. I mean, hello! I kinda like my life here. Mornye views Lynae: I wish to be like her, having the freedom to do what she wants. To act without constraint. Especially the constraint of a class schedule. It's a pity that profes ]
entries.name: Lynae and Mornye

entries.content: [ Lynae and Sigrika: Lynae views Sigrika: When I first got here, Sigrika helped me get a handle on student life She's super serious, the kind who never lets up on herself, Rover know? She never complains though, just bottles it all up inside. She's gonna hit a wall one day if she keeps that up So, how about Rover and I pull a little "intervention"? Rover know, take her out to have some real fun. ]
entries.name: Lynae and Sigrika

Her layered jellyfish-style haircut keeps the lower layer long while the upper layer is cut short, and loose strands often cover her right eye despite small clips holding her fringe back. Because she was born unable to move her legs due to underdeveloped lower spinal nerves, her delicate appearance carries a visible sense of physical fragility. ]
