entries.name: Mornye and Aemeath

entries.content: [ Mornye and Chisa: Mornye views Chisa: The freshman girl who vanished in the Void Storm I remember the incident clearly. It happened during my first year as a teaching assistant at the Academy. I even graded a paper she submitted. It was exceptionally well-written, with a logical structure, rigorous analysis, and precise formatting. Now, she's become the student who writes the best papers in my class. ]
entries.name: Mornye and Chisa

entries.content: [ Mornye and Denia: Mornye views Denia: Rover will see her at every public lecture, nodding along as if she understands every word. Until she inevitably dozes off, jolts awake after bumping her head on the seat, and then drifts off again I only later discovered that students receive credit solely for attendance. ]
entries.name: Mornye and Denia

entries.content: [ Mornye and Luuk Herssen: Mornye views Luuk Herssen: When I was a student, I frequented the infirmary. Dr. Herssen had me take a medicine imported from the New Federation that would only take effect if I went to bed before 10 P.M. A month passed, and my health improved. It wasn't until later that I found those medicines were just ordinary Lahai-Roi plant-based milk ]
entries.name: Mornye and Luuk Herssen

entries.content: [ Mornye and Lynae: Mornye views Lynae: I wish to be like her, having the freedom to do what she wants. To act without constraint. Especially the constraint of a class schedule. It's a pity that professors are forbidden to skip their own lectures Lynae views Mornye: What do Professor Mornye and I have in common? Easy. We both hate sitting through class! So I took her for a drive one time. Total stone face the whole time, but I could tell she was loving it. The best part was the welcome committee when we got back. A whole pack of her researchers, swarming the gates like I'd just pulled a full-blown professor-nappi ]
entries.name: Mornye and Lynae

entries.content: [ Mornye and Sigrika: Mornye views Sigrika: She's a remarkably conscientious student, but her persistence can sometimes be wasteful. For instance, she will fill the exam questions with unrelated formulas when she doesn't know the answers. It won't get her points. ]
entries.name: Mornye and Sigrika

entries.content: [ Mortefi identity: Mortefi is a Resonator with Fusion frequency who uses uses Pistols. Resonator classification: Mutant. Title: Dragon's Breath. Affiliation: Jinzhou, Huaxu Academy. Origin: New Federation. He hails from the New Federation and is the head of the Branch of Tacetite Weaponry within the Department of Safety in Huaxu Academy at Jinzhou. ]
entries.name: Mortefi identity

entries.content: [ Mortefi appearance: Mortefi is a red-haired man with glasses, a composed researcher look, and a white lab coat worn over a black-and-red outfit. His right chest bears a Tacet Mark surrounded by red crystalline matter that runs down his right arm like dragon scales. He hides the formations with bandages and fire-resistant gloves, but when his fury rises, the scales grow and channel flame like a dragon claw. ]
entries.name: Mortefi appearance

entries.content: [ Mortefi Forte: Associated Forte or power: Dragon's Breath. Evaluation Basis: [Resonance Assessment 2183-G]. According to Resonator Mortefi's reports, indications of his Awakening began to manifest during his youth. His actual Awakening was accompanied by a surge of intense anger. Mortefi's Tacet Mark is located on his right chest. When Mortefi's Forte is activated, crystalline matter in the shape of dragon scales materializes around his Tacet Mark. These scales burn intensely as he harnesses his power. Resonator Mortefi demonstrates the ability to generate and manipulate fire through the focused conce ]
entries.name: Mortefi Forte

entries.content: [ Mortefi resonance stability: Resonator Mortefi's waveform graph shows zigzag fluctuations. The pattern of Time Domain is regular, though the peak values show an increasing tendency. Peak values are currently under Criticality level, and abnormal waveforms are not identified. Resonant Criticality: High, combined with low stability. A high risk of Overclocking is present. Resonator Mortefi has a known history of Overclocking. Maximum recorded Overclock rating: Moderate. During Overclocking, the scale-shaped red crystalline matter on Mortefi's chest continuously expands to cover a larger area of his skin. ]
entries.name: Mortefi resonance stability

entries.content: [ Mortefi personality: Born into the upper class, Mortefi is a lofty man with an erudite look. Renowned for his exceptional talent in scientific research, Mortefi was once famed as the youngest genius in the New Federation. Driven by a thirst for knowledge, Mortefi later abandoned his privileged life to work as an International Research Fellow at the Huaxu Academy. It's not hard to win Mortefi's favor: Just remember to talk nicely, and always shower him with ample praise. ]
entries.name: Mortefi personality

entries.content: [ Mortefi affiliations: Mortefi belongs to Jinzhou, Huaxu Academy. Important place context: New Federation. ]
entries.name: Mortefi affiliations

entries.content: [ Mortefi history: Born into the upper class, Mortefi is a lofty man with an erudite look. Renowned for his exceptional talent in scientific research, Mortefi was once famed as the youngest genius in the New Federation. He hails from the New Federation and is the head of the Branch of Tacetite Weaponry within the Department of Safety in Huaxu Academy at Jinzhou. The International Research Fellow: As the only International Research Fellow at Huaxu Academy, Mortefi raises a lot of interest from the locals. Mortefi's passion for classical music, his habit of having exquisite desserts and afternoon tea, and last ]
entries.name: Mortefi history

entries.content: [ Mortefi and Aalto: Aalto views Mortefi: The Academy's red-haired international research fellow? I heard he's got a way of handling difficult clients. Actually I was thinking about asking him for some pointers. ]
entries.name: Mortefi and Aalto

entries.content: [ Mortefi and Baizhi: Mortefi views Baizhi: Baizhi and I are almost colleagues, though we don't work in the same department. I've only interacted with her briefly on a few occasions, but I had the chance to read some of her writings. Her paper was well-thought-out and carefully expressed, featuring an intriguing perspective. If I may comment, she is an excellent scholar of Remnant Creatures. ]
entries.name: Mortefi and Baizhi

entries.content: [ Mortefi and Calcharo: Calcharo views Mortefi: Pretentious, arrogant, and self-absorbed That man epitomizes every trait of those snooty New Federation nobles. That said, I cannot deny his talent in crafting Tacetite Weapons. I can arrange a meeting with our trusted arms dealer, if he's interested. ]
entries.name: Mortefi and Calcharo

entries.content: [ Mortefi and Chixia: Mortefi views Chixia: Speaking of Chixia, she's a regular visitor at my lab, often bringing children along. She's a straightforward person, which I like. Besides, those who get along with kids are never bad people. Kids are incredibly perspective of a person's true character. ]
entries.name: Mortefi and Chixia

entries.content: [ Mortefi and Jiyan: Mortefi views Jiyan: It was Jiyan who rescued me from the wilderness and referred me to the Academy, and I've been thankful for that, I have solved a lot of problems for him in return, of course. For example, all the Midnight Rangers currently use a one-piece medical kit of my design. ]
entries.name: Mortefi and Jiyan

entries.content: [ Mortefi and Xiangli Yao: Mortefi views Xiangli Yao: That Xiangli Yao, One day I'll outdo him, and create even beter inventions! Xiangli Yao views Mortefi: Mortefi is an interesting person. He's devoted to his work with unwavering determination. It's that kind of intense drive that pushes scientists towards brilliant discoveries. I know he considers me a "genius", but in a workplace with only "geniuses", many ideas will never be realized. My dear friend has yet to grasp his true potential. ]
entries.name: Mortefi and Xiangli Yao

entries.content: [ Mortefi and Yangyang: Mortefi views Yangyang: I hear her humming from time to time. Surprisingly, her melodies always bring my mind to peace. ]
entries.name: Mortefi and Yangyang

key: Symphony of Beyond The Conductor Mysterious Woman in Red
entries.content: [ Phrolova identity: Phrolova is a Resonator with Havoc frequency who uses uses Rectifier. Resonator classification: Mutant. Title: Symphony of Beyond, The Conductor, Mysterious Woman in Red. Affiliation: Fractsidus (formerly). Origin: Ostina. She is a particularly powerful Resonator and a former Overseer of the Fractsidus. Her forte can manipulate and transfigure the frequencies of humans, Echoes, and Tacet Discords alike. ]
entries.name: Phrolova identity
keys: Symphony of Beyond The Conductor Mysterious Woman in Red

entries.content: [ Phrolova appearance: Phrolova is a pale-skinned young woman of average build with long grayish-white hair kept in braids by red holders. Tacet Discord mutation has altered the hue of her left iris, and the right half of her face is covered with a bandage. She wears a red dress with a light-pink underside, a gray skirt underneath, detached sleeves, black leggings, and red high-heeled shoes, giving her a theatrical but damaged appearance. ]
entries.name: Phrolova appearance

entries.content: [ Phrolova Forte: Associated Forte or power: Symphony of Beyond. Evaluation Basis: [Resonance Assessment RA-F2005-G]. Resonator Phrolova's Awakening occurred at the time of her death, granting her the ability to tune the frequencies of her target and alter their "melodies" based on the understanding of critical frequency structuring of matters. The strength of such tuning ability is proportional to her physical condition. Latest test data indicate that under extreme Overclock conditions, while maintaining consciousness, Phrolova's tuning can be extended to a maximum of 30 times the normal range, with the lo ]
entries.name: Phrolova Forte

entries.content: [ Phrolova resonance stability: Journal Entry of Veron Toccata, Head of Toccata Family. Resonator Phrolova's waveform graph displays sawtooth and needle-like fluctuations. The Time Domain pattern frequently reveals intense and chaotic activity. During testing, the Time Domain data displayed significant distortion, and the peak value remains indeterminable. Resonant Critcality: Extremely low. Resonator Phrolova's frequency displays extremely low stability. It is noted that she has a known history of Overclocking. ]
entries.name: Phrolova resonance stability

entries.content: [ Phrolova personality: Phrolova is a very melancholic and enigmatic person, whose presence is filled with a pervasive sadness that seems to extend to everyone around her. This utter despair comes from a background of intense suffering, betrayal, and loss, which ultimately drove her to become a Fractsidus member. Her political affiliation with this faction seems to be motivated by a single, driving passion: to somehow reclaim or reawaken a lost past, one from which she is the lone survivor. ]
entries.name: Phrolova personality

entries.content: [ Phrolova affiliations: Phrolova belongs to Fractsidus (formerly). Important place context: Ostina. Her forte can manipulate and transfigure the frequencies of humans, Echoes, and Tacet Discords alike. ]
entries.name: Phrolova affiliations

entries.content: [ Phrolova history: Phrolova, a Fractsidus Overseer walking the fine line between life and death, an uncanny, deadly conductor. She is a particularly powerful Resonator and a former Overseer of the Fractsidus. Her forte can manipulate and transfigure the frequencies of humans, Echoes, and Tacet Discords alike. Song of Red and Black: The audience drowned in the performance. Some sat frozen, others trembled, swaying like reeds in a storm. In the dark, countless eyes locked onto that lone, delicate, yet powerful figure, their stares hypnotized by the rise and fall of her arms, like scattered notes lost in a fev ]
entries.name: Phrolova history

entries.content: [ Phrolova and Cartethyia: Phrolova views Cartethyia: Not human, yet possessing a will whole as any mortal's. A creation molded by Divinity how I envy her. If only I could unearth the universal truth behind her success, then perhaps the echoes from the other shore would sing even sweeter. ]
entries.name: Phrolova and Cartethyia

entries.content: [ Phrolova and Cristoforo: Phrolova views Cristoforo: Attempting to awaken true free will in mankind, one that dares to confront the very truths of this world is an intriguing pursuit. Pity that blind will, without the anchor of survival, becomes naught but a flash in the pan. Are not the uncontrollable turns and imperfect endings caught within the cracks of the script the very tolling of a warning bell? ]
entries.name: Phrolova and Cristoforo

entries.content: [ Phrolova and Scar: Phrolova views Scar: Madmen who don't play by the rules lack elegance. With but a breath, they undo even the most meticulous of plans. I care not for his true desires, only that he remain as far from me as fate will allow. ]
entries.name: Phrolova and Scar

entries.content: [ Phrolova and Schwarzloch: Phrolova views Schwarzloch: A singular existence. A living purpose. A point of reference Heh, given all this, isn't it comforting to openly acknowledge that he and I are both using each other for our own ends? ]
entries.name: Phrolova and Schwarzloch

key: Mingting Chongzhou Internal Security Agency formerly
entries.content: [ Qiuyuan identity: Qiuyuan is a Resonator with Aero frequency who uses uses Sword. Resonator classification: Unclear. Title: Bambooscape. Affiliation: Mingting, Chongzhou, Internal Security Agency (formerly). Origin: Huanglong. Nation: Huanglong. Former senior agent of Mingting's Internal Security Agency, he is a swordsman of cool resilience and absolute integrity, wandering Huanglong alone and seeks not fame nor high office, but mastery of swordsmanship and a life guided by high morals. ]
entries.name: Qiuyuan identity
keys: Mingting Chongzhou Internal Security Agency formerly

entries.content: [ Qiuyuan appearance: Qiuyuan is a tall, muscular man with muted gray eyes, a straight nose, and a clean scar along his left cheek. His long dark hair has light-gray tips and is tied into a ponytail with an emerald string and pin, falling between his shoulder blades when bound. His Tacet Mark sits on his right palm, and his rice hat, flowing green-accented clothing, and swordsman silhouette make him look like a disciplined wandering martial artist. ]
entries.name: Qiuyuan appearance

entries.content: [ Qiuyuan Forte: Associated Forte or power: Bambooscape. Miscellaneous Records of Mingting's Minister of Sentinel Affairs: Correspondence Collection. My dear friend Dongyuan,. A few days prior, the Internal Security Agency forwarded documents from the Justice Commission and the Huaxu Academy to the Ministry of Sentinel Affairs. Without delay, I instructed the Chongzhou administrator to assist in the matter and thoroughly examine the local Resonator register. It has now been confirmed that the individual in question has no connection with the Sentinel or the Threnodian of Chongzhou. ]
entries.name: Qiuyuan Forte

entries.content: [ Qiuyuan resonance stability: Miscellaneous Records of Mingting's Ministry of Sentinel Affairs: Correspondence Collection. In my recent observations over the past few days, it appears less that he refuses to employ his Forte and more that he consciously restrains himself from using it. Regarding the nature of the ability itself, he remains decidedly reserved. Only from the Academy's report may one glean a few particulars:. Test subject waveform analysis presents an elliptical oscillation. Time-domain readings are stable, with no anomalous patterns observed. Resonant Criticality: High. Stability is high with no risk ]
entries.name: Qiuyuan resonance stability

entries.content: [ Qiuyuan personality: Qiuyuan, a swordsman of cool resilience and absolute integrity, wandering Huanglong alone, He seeks not fame nor high office, but mastery of swordsmanship and a life guided by high morals. ]
entries.name: Qiuyuan personality

entries.content: [ Qiuyuan affiliations: Qiuyuan belongs to Mingting, Chongzhou, Internal Security Agency (formerly). Important place context: Huanglong, Huanglong. ]
entries.name: Qiuyuan affiliations

entries.content: [ Qiuyuan history: Qiuyuan, a swordsman of cool resilience and absolute integrity, wandering Huanglong alone, He seeks not fame nor high office, but mastery of swordsmanship and a life guided by high morals. Former senior agent of Mingting's Internal Security Agency, he is a swordsman of cool resilience and absolute integrity, wandering Huanglong alone and seeks not fame nor high office, but mastery of swordsmanship and a life guided by high morals. Tempered: Every mountain stands as a trial. Pass this one, and Rover are free to take Rover's own path. Fail, then this mountain shall keep what Rover have.". T ]
entries.name: Qiuyuan history

key: Euphonic Chrysalis The Second Instance Guardian of Secrets
entries.content: [ Shorekeeper identity: Shorekeeper is a Resonator with Spectro frequency who uses uses Rectifier. Resonator classification: Unknown. Title: Euphonic Chrysalis, The Second Instance, Guardian of Secrets. Affiliation: Black Shores. Origin: The Black Shores. Nation: The Black Shores. She is known as "the Second Instance," the Guardian of the Black Shores, and is a mythical entity composed of Sonoro Spheres and high-purity Remnant Energy crystals with the power to guide the Tethys System and control the stars themselves, only appearing during times of crisis to aid the true leader of the Black Shores. ]
entries.name: Shorekeeper identity
keys: Euphonic Chrysalis The Second Instance Guardian of Secrets

entries.content: [ Shorekeeper appearance: The Shorekeeper is a fair-skinned woman with blue-purple eyes, white pupils, and red rings around the pupils. Her layered light-blue hair falls in short upper layers and longer strands that darken toward blue. She wears a large hooded veil made from sparkling blue fabric on one side and white cloth with silver trim on the other, decorated with delicate white butterfly bows, while her ethereal blue-white dress carries butterfly and sea-like motifs. ]
entries.name: Shorekeeper appearance

entries.content: [ Shorekeeper Forte: Associated Forte or power: Euphonic Chrysalis. [Extracted records Record - A.A1001]. Subject: Second Instance. Recorder: ▇▇▇▇. Record Segment: A.A-000. The Second Instance (also known as the Shorekeeper) is composed entirely of high-purity Remnant Energy crystals. Its successful activation confirms the viability of ▇▇▇▇'s theory, which proposes the following:. By modeling the "Blazar" module anchor, Remnant Energy can be attracted and condensed, resulting in the materialization of energy. Pre-loading informational data into the energy entity grants it cognitive abilities. ]
entries.name: Shorekeeper Forte

entries.content: [ Shorekeeper resonance stability: [Extracted records Record - A.A1001]. Subject: Second Instance. Recorder: ▇▇▇▇. Record Segment: A.A-311. The ▇▇▇ test results for the Shorekeeper are generally within controllable parameters. However, the Remnant Energy within her has shown signs of dissipation multiple times, leading to excessive energy loss and crystal fragmentation. This may be attributed to the processing of Lament data via massive computation. Notably, the Shorekeeper has detected these issues and has attempted to mitigate the damage by replacing her damaged parts with new energy crystals. ]
entries.name: Shorekeeper resonance stability

entries.content: [ Shorekeeper personality: As the head of the organization, The Shorekeeper embraces the moniker "The Shorekeeper" wholeheartedly, as it encapsulates her mission and purpose. The Shorekeeper exudes a refined elegance, her physical beauty enhanced by the regal aura that surrounds her. She carries herself with grace and poise, her every movement a dance of subtlety and charm. Her fair skin and blue-purple eyes, adorned with a hint of red and blue, add an alluring mystique to her already captivating presence. ]
entries.name: Shorekeeper personality

entries.content: [ Shorekeeper affiliations: Shorekeeper belongs to Black Shores. Important place context: The Black Shores, The Black Shores. She is known as "the Second Instance," the Guardian of the Black Shores, and is a mythical entity composed of Sonoro Spheres and high-purity Remnant Energy crystals with the power to guide the Tethys System and control the stars themselves, only appearing during times of crisis to aid the true leader of the Black Shores. ]
entries.name: Shorekeeper affiliations

entries.content: [ Shorekeeper history: The Shorekeeper of the Black Shores, a mysterious divine being governing the essence of aloofness, emerges in response to Rover's summon. She is known as "the Second Instance," the Guardian of the Black Shores, and is a mythical entity composed of Sonoro Spheres and high-purity Remnant Energy crystals with the power to guide the Tethys System and control the stars themselves, only appearing during times of crisis to aid the true leader of the Black Shores. The Shorekeeper's Birth: After the drumbeat, we call the heart dancing in the darkness the moon. This moon is largely formed by Rover. ]
entries.name: Shorekeeper history

entries.content: [ Shorekeeper and Aalto: Shorekeeper views Aalto: A mature organization requires a personable and skilled negotiator, adept at forging connections with all they encounter. In the case of the Black Shores, that person is Aalto. His keen insight ensures he obtains crucial information precisely when needed. Beneath his playful smile lies a resolute determination to end the Lament. Despite other offers, he was destined for the Black Shores' path from the start. ]
entries.name: Shorekeeper and Aalto

entries.content: [ Shorekeeper and Aemeath: Aemeath views Shorekeeper: On nights filled with Rover's sighs, I used to sneak near Rover's desk, catching snippets of Rover's conversations with her. Shorekeeper, yes, that's her name. Whenever Rover talked with her, the weight in Rover's breath would lift. ]
entries.name: Shorekeeper and Aemeath

entries.content: [ Shorekeeper and Black Shores: Shorekeeper views Black Shores: Atop this massive Tacetite lies the ideal "singularity" spot to observe the Lament. This is where we formed the Black Shores, its members distinguished by their Blake Blooms. Beneath the endless stars, humanity's light glimmers. That light belongs to those who had given their lives to illuminate a brighter future for all. I've welcomed countless such people into this place and bid farewell to just as many. ]
entries.name: Shorekeeper and Black Shores

entries.content: [ Shorekeeper and Camellya: Camellya views Shorekeeper: She's always so serious, following every rule despite being our de facto leader now. Well, she's taken care of me before on many occassions, so I gotta show some respect Wait, I've been a Bloom Bearer for years? How time flies ]
entries.name: Shorekeeper and Camellya

entries.content: [ Shorekeeper and Rover: Shorekeeper views Rover: Though her words may not always align with her actions, she remains fiercely loyal to her desires. Her carefree lifestyle holds a certain charm, yes, but we were made differently, with distinct objectives to pursue. Following Rover's example, I've allowed her to make her own choices, without limitations. ]
entries.name: Shorekeeper and Rover

entries.content: [ Shorekeeper and Encore: Shorekeeper views Encore: Encore sees the world as a canvas for her boundless imagination. A warrior, a knight, or a little adventurer In her tales, she can become anyone she wants to triumph over evil and reach a happy ending. Wherever she ventures, her radiant energy dispels dismay. Perhaps this is what Tethys saw in her when she was chosen. ]
entries.name: Shorekeeper and Encore

entries.content: [ Shorekeeper and Tethys System: Shorekeeper views Tethys System: Encore sees the world as a canvas for her boundless imagination. A warrior, a knight, or a little adventurer In her tales, she can become anyone she wants to triumph over evil and reach a happy ending. Wherever she ventures, her radiant energy dispels dismay. Perhaps this is what Tethys saw in her when she was chosen. ]
entries.name: Shorekeeper and Tethys System

entries.content: [ Xiangli Yao identity: Xiangli Yao is a Resonator with Electro frequency who uses uses Gauntlets. Resonator classification: Mutant. Title: Matter Weaver. Affiliation: Jinzhou, Huaxu Academy. Origin: Huanglong. Nation: Huanglong. He is the Principal Investigator in charge of the academics at Huaxu Academy's Jinzhou Campus. He is the Academy's youngest multi-disciplinary scientist, and an expert in the research of Automata Mechanics. ]
entries.name: Xiangli Yao identity

entries.content: [ Xiangli Yao appearance: Xiangli Yao is a slim young man of average height with short light-brown hair tipped gray and piercing blue eyes ringed with pale pink. His right arm has been replaced by a cybernetic prosthetic that also bears his Tacet Mark. He wears a blue-and-white suit with patterned dark-blue panels, white coattails, orange electrical accents, and an asymmetric sleeveless side that displays the mechanical arm central to his design. ]
entries.name: Xiangli Yao appearance

entries.content: [ Xiangli Yao Forte: Associated Forte or power: Matter Weaver. Evaluation Basis: [Resonance Assessment 2603-G]. Post-Awakening observations revealed his ability to perform Metalmorph by manipulating the shape and storing energy of his prosthetic arm. A strong Syntony reaction has been observed, yet the cause of Xiangli Yao's Awakening remains unclear due to the inability to recover samples of the unknown metal substance. Therefore, Xiangli Yao is identified as a Mutant Resonator. ]
entries.name: Xiangli Yao Forte

entries.content: [ Xiangli Yao resonance stability: Resonator Xiangli Yao's waveform graph shows elliptical fluctuations. The pattern of Time Domain is stable with no abnormal waveforms. Xiangli Yao's frequency displays high stability with minimal risk of Overclocking. ]
entries.name: Xiangli Yao resonance stability

entries.content: [ Xiangli Yao personality: To be added ]
entries.name: Xiangli Yao personality

entries.content: [ Xiangli Yao affiliations: Xiangli Yao belongs to Jinzhou, Huaxu Academy. Important place context: Huanglong, Huanglong. ]
entries.name: Xiangli Yao affiliations

entries.content: [ Xiangli Yao history: Huaxu Academy's Principal Investigator, Xiangli Yao, displays exceptional expertise in various research fields despite his young age. He is a gentle yet rational soul, embracing unique insights and commitment to the research of Automata Mechanics. He is the Principal Investigator in charge of the academics at Huaxu Academy's Jinzhou Campus. He is the Academy's youngest multi-disciplinary scientist, and an expert in the research of Automata Mechanics. An Interview: Years later, I found myself standing at that door again. The Xiangli family had always been a star in Jinzhou's journalistic c ]
entries.name: Xiangli Yao history

entries.content: [ Xiangli Yao and Aalto: Xiangli Yao views Aalto: Aalto once approached me with an offer from the Black Shores, but I declined. Life at the Academy suits me well. Though his manner may seem unserious, Aalto has a sharp eye for valuable information and connections for rare materials. I've frequently relied on his services. ]
entries.name: Xiangli Yao and Aalto

entries.content: [ Xiangli Yao and Baizhi: Xiangli Yao views Baizhi: Baizhi is a great researcher. Our work doesn't often overlap, but I've read her reports and they're well-informed and persuasive. She often participates in field research, earning her a reputation among peers for bringing back valuable data. ]
entries.name: Xiangli Yao and Baizhi

entries.content: [ Xiangli Yao and Jinhsi: Xiangli Yao views Jinhsi: Magistrate Jinhsi has been paying close attention to the battles against Tacet Discords. She often visits the Academy to learn about our latest progress in weapons development. During those visits, she always seems tense. I understand the pressure and weight she carries, with all the promises and expectations placed on her shoulders ]
entries.name: Xiangli Yao and Jinhsi

entries.content: [ Xiangli Yao and Jiyan: Xiangli Yao views Jiyan: The Midnight Rangers bring valuable insights on Tacet Discords from their years of combat experience. General Jiyan has shared his extensive knowledge and new ideas with us. He possesses a gentle and just nature, but what truly sets him apart is his composure. This is essential for someone in his position. ]
entries.name: Xiangli Yao and Jiyan

entries.content: [ Xiangli Yao and Mortefi: Xiangli Yao views Mortefi: Mortefi is an interesting person. He's devoted to his work with unwavering determination. It's that kind of intense drive that pushes scientists towards brilliant discoveries. I know he considers me a "genius", but in a workplace with only "geniuses", many ideas will never be realized. My dear friend has yet to grasp his true potential. Mortefi views Xiangli Yao: That Xiangli Yao, One day I'll outdo him, and create even beter inventions! ]
entries.name: Xiangli Yao and Mortefi

entries.content: [ Zani identity: Zani is a Resonator with Spectro frequency who uses uses Gauntlets. Resonator classification: Mutant. Title: Scorched Radiance, The Blazing Nightwalker. Affiliation: Ragunna, Montelli Family, Averado Bank. Origin: Rinascita. Nation: Rinascita. She is a staff member of the Montelli Family's Averardo Bank in Ragunna. As a serious and reliable Montelli employee, Zani follows a strict routine and manages tasks with ease. For years, she has clocked in on time without fail, finding as much enjoyment in her well-ordered life as in her carefully planned moments of leisure. ]
entries.name: Zani identity

entries.content: [ Zani appearance: Zani is a tall pale woman with white hair, dark red slit-pupiled eyes, dark eyebags, and a beauty mark under her right eye. Her awakening left her with black ram-like horns and a slim pointed tail. She wears a high-collared white button-up shirt with cuffed sleeves and gold buttons, a bright red tie, and a black leather harness clasped by a circular gold buckle, making her look formal, severe, and openly demonic. ]
entries.name: Zani appearance

entries.content: [ Zani Forte: Associated Forte or power: Scorched Radiance. [Averardo Vault Employee Profile, Access Permission Confirmed]. Employee Name: Zani. The Awakening history of Employee Zani remains unknown. Her Forte development level and usage frequency are both high. Zani's Tacet mark runs diagonally across her back. Post-Awakening, she has undergone significant physical mutations, including the emergence of ram-like horns and a slender tail extending from her coccyx. When Zani activates her Forte, she can temporarily store excess kinetic energy within her body to enhance her physical capabilities. ]
entries.name: Zani Forte

entries.content: [ Zani resonance stability: [Averardo Vault Employee Profile, Access Permission Confirmed]. This employee's waveform graph shows elliptical fluctuations. The Time Domain pattern is regular and no signs of abnormal fluctuations are observed. The test results are assessed as being within the normal phase. Resonant Criticality: High. This employee possesses high stability with minimal risk of Overclocking. Records indicate no history of Overclocking. There is no current need for psychological counseling. Honestly, I'm not surprised by these results. ]
entries.name: Zani resonance stability

entries.content: [ Zani personality: Zani has a fascinating duality of character: a fastidiously well-ordered and extremely competent professional during the day, and a powerful, nearly elemental, force for justice at night. Her public image is one of steadfast devotion to routine and order, a quality she nurtures through her decades-long association with the Montelli family's Averardo Bank. ]
entries.name: Zani personality

entries.content: [ Zani affiliations: Zani belongs to Ragunna, Montelli Family, Averado Bank. Important place context: Rinascita, Rinascita. She is a staff member of the Montelli Family's Averardo Bank in Ragunna. ]
entries.name: Zani affiliations

entries.content: [ Zani history: Zani, a serious and reliable Montelli employee, follows a strict routine and manages tasks with ease. For years, she has clocked in on time without fail, finding as much enjoyment in her well-ordered life as in her carefully planned moments of leisure. She is a staff member of the Montelli Family's Averardo Bank in Ragunna. As a serious and reliable Montelli employee, Zani follows a strict routine and manages tasks with ease. A Regular": It was already past midnight, and the lights in the shop windows had flickered out, leaving the lively city of Ragunna cloaked in a solemn, silent embrace ]
entries.name: Zani history

entries.content: [ Zani and Brant: Zani views Brant: Brant is a skilled actor, a respected captain, and a fighter willing to sacrifice everything for truth and justice. But what I envy most is that he's never weighed down by stacks of paperwork. If I knew anything about acting, I'd quit this job, join the Troupe of Fools, and live the carefree life he does Now, now. Just a pipe dream to keep me going. Brant views Zani: Many wear masks to fit in, but not her. Whatever her past, whatever roles she's played, she's here now, true to herself. ]
entries.name: Zani and Brant

entries.content: [ Zani and Cantarella: Zani views Cantarella: The Fisalia family has always clung to Ragunna's traditions, stubbornly resisting change. But Signorina Cantarella, the current head, isn't as traditional as people imagine. As an employee, I do not get to influence how the Montellis handle their relationship with the Fisalias but personally, I wouldn't mind working with her. ]
entries.name: Zani and Cantarella

entries.content: [ Zani and Carlotta: Zani views Carlotta: Lady Carlotta? Her vision has never been limited to Ragunna, or even Rinascita. Hers was about the world beyond the sea horizon. I don't know what kind of future she sees, but I'll stand by her until the day her vision becomes reality. ]
entries.name: Zani and Carlotta

entries.content: [ Zani and Ciaccona: Zani views Ciaccona: I've seen Ciaccona perform a few times outside the city. She often sings about Rinascita's old folklore. I once asked her if she thought the age of heroes described in her poems had ended, whether heroes had already exited the stage of history. She answered that as long as there is suffering, someone will rise up to be the new hero. ]
entries.name: Zani and Ciaccona

entries.content: [ Zani and Phoebe: Zani views Phoebe: To me, Ragunna's fate lies in the will of its people, not the Sentinel. Many Acolytes would call this heresy, but not Phoebe. That's what makes her unique. She would never dismiss another's beliefs or efforts just because they do not align with her own. ]
entries.name: Zani and Phoebe
